                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{BouncyCastleProvider}\OperatorTok{());}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Pitfall 2: Using save() Instead of
saveIncremental()}\label{_pitfall_2_using_save_instead_of_saveincremental}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{// WRONG {-}{-} destroys all existing signatures}
\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{save}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{outputStream}\OperatorTok{);}

\CommentTok{// CORRECT {-}{-} preserves existing signatures}
\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{outputStream}\OperatorTok{);}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

A regular \texttt{save()} rewrites the entire PDF from scratch. This
changes every byte offset in the file, which means every existing
signature's byte range is now wrong. Every signature becomes invalid.
Use \texttt{saveIncremental()}. Always.

\subsection{Pitfall 3: /Contents Container Too
Small}\label{_pitfall_3_contents_container_too_small}

If the CMS blob returned by your \texttt{sign()} method exceeds the
space reserved by \texttt{preferredSignatureSize}, you get:

\begin{verbatim}
java.io.IOException: Can't write signature, not enough space
\end{verbatim}

The fix is straightforward --- increase the container size. But be aware
that the container size is in \emph{bytes of hex encoding}, not bytes of
CMS data. A 32768-byte container holds approximately 16 KB of CMS data
(since each byte becomes two hex characters).

When in doubt, use 65536 (64 KB). The extra space is filled with hex
zeros and adds about 64 KB to the file size --- negligible for most
PDFs.

\subsection{Pitfall 4: Not Closing the
PDDocument}\label{_pitfall_4_not_closing_the_pddocument}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{// WRONG {-}{-} resource leak, and on some JVMs the temp files}
\CommentTok{// created by PDFBox are never cleaned up}
\NormalTok{PDDocument doc }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Loader}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{loadPDF}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{bytes}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sig}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ iface}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ opts}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{baos}\OperatorTok{);}
\CommentTok{// doc is never closed!}

\CommentTok{// CORRECT {-}{-} use try{-}with{-}resources}
\ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDDocument doc }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Loader}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{loadPDF}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{bytes}\OperatorTok{))} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{    doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sig}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ iface}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ opts}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{baos}\OperatorTok{);}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\texttt{PDDocument} implements \texttt{Closeable}. If you do not close
it, temporary files and memory-mapped buffers may not be released. In a
server application that signs thousands of documents, this leads to
\texttt{OutOfMemoryError} or file handle exhaustion.

\subsection{Pitfall 5: Signing After Closing the
Document}\label{_pitfall_5_signing_after_closing_the_document}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{// WRONG {-}{-} the document is closed before saveIncremental()}
\NormalTok{PDDocument doc }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Loader}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{loadPDF}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{bytes}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sig}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ iface}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ opts}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{close}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{baos}\OperatorTok{);} \CommentTok{// throws IllegalStateException}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\texttt{addSignature()} only registers the signature. The actual signing
happens inside \texttt{saveIncremental()}. If you close the document
before calling \texttt{saveIncremental()}, the document's internal
structures are released, and the save fails.

\subsection{Pitfall 6: Reusing a PDSignature
Object}\label{_pitfall_6_reusing_a_pdsignature_object}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{// WRONG {-}{-} reusing the same PDSignature for two documents}
\NormalTok{PDSignature sig }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{sig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setFilter}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{FILTER\_ADOBE\_PPKLITE}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{doc1}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sig}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ iface}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ opts}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{doc1}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{out1}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{doc2}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sig}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ iface}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ opts}\OperatorTok{);} \CommentTok{// \textless{}{-}{-} BROKEN}
\NormalTok{doc2}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{out2}\OperatorTok{);}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

A \texttt{PDSignature} is a COS dictionary tied to a specific document.
After it is added to \texttt{doc1} and saved, it belongs to
\texttt{doc1}. Create a new \texttt{PDSignature} for each document.

\section{Timestamp Embedding}\label{_timestamp_embedding}

A timestamp proves when a signature was created. Without it, you have a
PAdES-B-B signature. With it, you have PAdES-B-T.

\subsection{Embedding a TSA Timestamp as an Unsigned
Attribute}\label{_embedding_a_tsa_timestamp_as_an_unsigned_attribute}

The timestamp token is an RFC 3161 \texttt{TimeStampToken} embedded as
an unsigned attribute (\texttt{id-aa-signatureTimeStampToken}, OID
1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.14) in the CMS \texttt{SignerInfo}.

The flow is:

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\item
  Generate the CMS \texttt{SignedData} (without the timestamp)
\item
  Extract the signer's raw signature value from the \texttt{SignerInfo}
\item
  Hash the signature value with SHA-256
\item
  Send the hash to the TSA, receive a \texttt{TimeStampToken}
\item
  Attach the token as an unsigned attribute on the \texttt{SignerInfo}
\item
  Return the modified CMS \texttt{SignedData}
\end{enumerate}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pkcs}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Collections}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Embeds an RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ timestamp token as an unsigned attribute}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ in a CMS SignedData structure}\CommentTok{. }\NormalTok{This upgrades a PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ signature to PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{T}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData }\FunctionTok{embedTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSSignedData signedData}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                                     TsaClient tsaClient}\OperatorTok{,}
                                     \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{)}
        \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

    \CommentTok{// Get the first (and typically only) signer}
\NormalTok{    SignerInformation signerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{()}
            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSigners}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{iterator}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{next}\OperatorTok{();}

    \CommentTok{// The signature value is what gets timestamped}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signatureBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signerInfo}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignature}\OperatorTok{();}

    \CommentTok{// Request timestamp from TSA (see Chapter 18 for TSA details)}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ tsTokenBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsaClient}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimestampToken}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ signatureBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// Parse the timestamp token as ASN.1}
\NormalTok{    ASN1Primitive tsToken }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fromByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsTokenBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// Build the unsigned attribute}
\NormalTok{    ASN1EncodableVector unsignedAttrsVec }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{    unsignedAttrsVec}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signatureTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{,}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsToken}\OperatorTok{)));}
\NormalTok{    AttributeTable unsignedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{unsignedAttrsVec}\OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// Replace the signer\textquotesingle{}s unsigned attributes}
\NormalTok{    SignerInformation newSignerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{            SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceUnsignedAttributes}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    signerInfo}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ unsignedAttrs}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{    SignerInformationStore newSignerInfos }\OperatorTok{=}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \BuiltInTok{Collections}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{singletonList}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{newSignerInfo}\OperatorTok{));}

    \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceSigners}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedData}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ newSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{);}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

The timestamp is embedded \emph{after} the CMS signature is generated.
This is important: the timestamp covers the signature value, not the
document content. The document content is covered by the CMS signature
itself. The timestamp proves when that signature was created. This
two-layer structure is fundamental to PAdES-B-T.

\section{Complete Production-Ready Signing
Class}\label{_complete_production_ready_signing_class}

Here is a complete signing class that handles all the scenarios
discussed in this chapter: invisible and visible signatures, PAdES-B-B
and PAdES-B-T profiles, certification signatures, and multi-signature
workflows.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ByteArrayOutputStream}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Loader}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{font}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PDType1Font}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{font}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Standard14Fonts}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{graphics}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{form}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PDFormXObject}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{interactive}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{interactive}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignatureInterface}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{interactive}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignatureOptions}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{nist}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pkcs}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{x509}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ContentSigner}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DigestCalculatorProvider}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Production}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ready PDF signing service using PDFBox }\CommentTok{\{}\NormalTok{pdfbox}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{version}\CommentTok{\}}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ and BouncyCastle }\CommentTok{\{}\NormalTok{bc}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{version}\CommentTok{\}.}
 \CommentTok{*}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Supports}\CommentTok{:}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{basic}\CommentTok{)}\NormalTok{ and PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{T }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{timestamped}\CommentTok{)}\NormalTok{ profiles}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ Visible and invisible signatures}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ Approval and certification }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{DocMDP}\CommentTok{)}\NormalTok{ signatures}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ Multi}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{signature workflows}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ ProductionPdfSigner }\OperatorTok{\{}

    \CommentTok{/**}\NormalTok{ Container size for signatures without timestamps}\CommentTok{. */}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static} \DataTypeTok{final} \DataTypeTok{int}\NormalTok{ CONTAINER\_SIZE\_BASIC }\OperatorTok{=} \DecValTok{32768}\OperatorTok{;}

    \CommentTok{/**}\NormalTok{ Container size for signatures with TSA timestamps}\CommentTok{. */}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static} \DataTypeTok{final} \DataTypeTok{int}\NormalTok{ CONTAINER\_SIZE\_WITH\_TSA }\OperatorTok{=} \DecValTok{65536}\OperatorTok{;}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Signs a PDF document}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{pdfBytes}\CommentTok{    }\NormalTok{the original PDF bytes}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{privateKey}\CommentTok{  }\NormalTok{the signer}\CommentTok{\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{s private key}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{certificate}\CommentTok{ }\NormalTok{the signer}\CommentTok{\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{s X}\CommentTok{.509}\NormalTok{ certificate}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{chain}\CommentTok{       }\NormalTok{the full certificate chain }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{signer }\CommentTok{+}\NormalTok{ intermediates}\CommentTok{)}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{config}\CommentTok{      }\NormalTok{signing configuration}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@return}\NormalTok{ the signed PDF bytes }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{incremental save}\CommentTok{)}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{sign}\OperatorTok{(}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ pdfBytes}\OperatorTok{,}
                       \BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{,}
                       \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{,}
                       \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                       SigningConfig config}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDDocument doc }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Loader}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{loadPDF}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{pdfBytes}\OperatorTok{))} \OperatorTok{\{}

            \CommentTok{// Resolve the target signature field}
\NormalTok{            PDAcroForm acroForm }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getDocumentCatalog}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{getAcroForm}\OperatorTok{();}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{acroForm }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IllegalStateException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"PDF has no AcroForm"}\OperatorTok{);}
            \OperatorTok{\}}

\NormalTok{            PDSignatureField sigField }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{findEmptySignatureField}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    acroForm}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fieldName}\OperatorTok{());}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigField }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IllegalStateException}\OperatorTok{(}
                        \StringTok{"No empty signature field: "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fieldName}\OperatorTok{());}
            \OperatorTok{\}}

            \CommentTok{// Build the /Sig dictionary}
\NormalTok{            PDSignature signature }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setFilter}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{FILTER\_ADOBE\_PPKLITE}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSubFilter}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"ETSI.CAdES.detached"}\OperatorTok{));}
\NormalTok{            signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSignDate}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{Calendar}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{());}
\NormalTok{            signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setName}\OperatorTok{(}\FunctionTok{extractCN}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certificate}\OperatorTok{));}

            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{reason}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{                signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setReason}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{reason}\OperatorTok{());}
            \OperatorTok{\}}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{location}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{                signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setLocation}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{location}\OperatorTok{());}
            \OperatorTok{\}}

            \CommentTok{// Certification signature (DocMDP)}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{certification}\OperatorTok{())} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \FunctionTok{applyCertification}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ signature}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{docMdpLevel}\OperatorTok{());}
            \OperatorTok{\}}

\NormalTok{            sigField}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setValue}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signature}\OperatorTok{);}

            \CommentTok{// Determine container size}
            \DataTypeTok{boolean}\NormalTok{ useTsa }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}
                    \OperatorTok{\&\&} \OperatorTok{!}\NormalTok{config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{isBlank}\OperatorTok{();}
            \DataTypeTok{int}\NormalTok{ containerSize }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ useTsa}
                    \OperatorTok{?}\NormalTok{ CONTAINER\_SIZE\_WITH\_TSA }\OperatorTok{:}\NormalTok{ CONTAINER\_SIZE\_BASIC}\OperatorTok{;}

\NormalTok{            SignatureOptions options }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignatureOptions}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            options}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setPreferredSignatureSize}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{containerSize}\OperatorTok{);}

            \CommentTok{// Visible appearance}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{visible}\OperatorTok{())} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \FunctionTok{buildTextAppearance}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ sigField}\OperatorTok{,}
                        \FunctionTok{extractCN}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certificate}\OperatorTok{),}\NormalTok{ config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{reason}\OperatorTok{());}
            \OperatorTok{\}}

            \CommentTok{// CMS signing callback}
\NormalTok{            PadesCmsCallback callback }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PadesCmsCallback}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    privateKey}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                    useTsa }\OperatorTok{?}\NormalTok{ config}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{:} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{            doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signature}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ callback}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ options}\OperatorTok{);}

            \BuiltInTok{ByteArrayOutputStream}\NormalTok{ baos }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{ByteArrayOutputStream}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{baos}\OperatorTok{);}
            \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ baos}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{toByteArray}\OperatorTok{();}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{// ── Configuration record ─────────────────────────────────────────}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Immutable configuration for a signing operation}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{record} \FunctionTok{SigningConfig}\OperatorTok{(}
            \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ fieldName}\OperatorTok{,}
            \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ reason}\OperatorTok{,}
            \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ location}\OperatorTok{,}
            \DataTypeTok{boolean}\NormalTok{ visible}\OperatorTok{,}
            \DataTypeTok{boolean}\NormalTok{ certification}\OperatorTok{,}
            \DataTypeTok{int}\NormalTok{ docMdpLevel}\OperatorTok{,}
            \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \KeywordTok{public}\NormalTok{ SigningConfig }\OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{fieldName }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null} \OperatorTok{||}\NormalTok{ fieldName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{isBlank}\OperatorTok{())} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IllegalArgumentException}\OperatorTok{(}
                        \StringTok{"fieldName is required"}\OperatorTok{);}
            \OperatorTok{\}}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{// ── CMS callback ─────────────────────────────────────────────────}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ PadesCmsCallback }\KeywordTok{implements}\NormalTok{ SignatureInterface }\OperatorTok{\{}

        \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
        \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
        \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{;}
        \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{;}

        \FunctionTok{PadesCmsCallback}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{,}
                         \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{,}
                         \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{,}
                         \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{privateKey} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
            \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{certificate} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
            \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{chain} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{;}
            \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsaUrl} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{;}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \AttributeTok{@Override}
        \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{sign}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{InputStream}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{IOException} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ contentBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{readAllBytes}\OperatorTok{();}

                \CommentTok{// Determine signature algorithm from key type}
                \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ keyAlgo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getAlgorithm}\OperatorTok{();}
                \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ sigAlgo }\OperatorTok{=} \StringTok{"EC"}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{equals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{keyAlgo}\OperatorTok{)}
                        \OperatorTok{?} \StringTok{"SHA256withECDSA"} \OperatorTok{:} \StringTok{"SHA256withRSA"}\OperatorTok{;}

                \CommentTok{// Build certificate store}
\NormalTok{                JcaCertStore certStore }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{chain}\OperatorTok{);}

                \CommentTok{// Content signer}
\NormalTok{                ContentSigner signer }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigAlgo}\OperatorTok{)}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{)}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{privateKey}\OperatorTok{);}

                \CommentTok{// Digest calculator}
\NormalTok{                DigestCalculatorProvider dcProvider }\OperatorTok{=}
                        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

                \CommentTok{// Build signer info with ESS{-}signing{-}certificate{-}v2}
\NormalTok{                JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder signerBuilder }\OperatorTok{=}
                        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dcProvider}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{                AttributeTable signedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=}
                        \FunctionTok{buildEssSigningCertAttribute}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certificate}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{                signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSignedAttributeGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}
                        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{                SignerInfoGenerator signerInfoGen }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                        signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signer}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{);}

                \CommentTok{// Assemble the CMS SignedData}
\NormalTok{                CMSSignedDataGenerator gen }\OperatorTok{=}
                        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{                gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signerInfoGen}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{                gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addCertificates}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certStore}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{                CMSProcessableByteArray cmsContent }\OperatorTok{=}
                        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{contentBytes}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{                CMSSignedData signedData }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                        gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{cmsContent}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{false}\OperatorTok{);}

                \CommentTok{// PAdES{-}B{-}T: add timestamp}
                \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null} \OperatorTok{\&\&} \OperatorTok{!}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{isBlank}\OperatorTok{())} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{                    signedData }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{addTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedData}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{);}
                \OperatorTok{\}}

                \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{();}

            \OperatorTok{\}} \ControlFlowTok{catch} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{Exception}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}
                        \StringTok{"CMS signing failed: "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getMessage}\OperatorTok{(),}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{);}
            \OperatorTok{\}}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \KeywordTok{private}\NormalTok{ AttributeTable }\FunctionTok{buildEssSigningCertAttribute}\OperatorTok{(}
                \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ cert}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ md }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ certHash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ md}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{            AlgorithmIdentifier hashAlgo }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            ESSCertIDv2 essCertId }\OperatorTok{=}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{hashAlgo}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certHash}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            SigningCertificateV2 sigCertV2 }\OperatorTok{=}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{(}
                            \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{essCertId}\OperatorTok{\});}

\NormalTok{            ASN1EncodableVector v }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            v}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signingCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{,}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigCertV2}\OperatorTok{)));}

            \ControlFlowTok{return} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{v}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \KeywordTok{private}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData }\FunctionTok{addTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSSignedData signedData}\OperatorTok{,}
                                            \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{)}
                \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            SignerInformation signerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signedData}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{getSigners}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{iterator}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{next}\OperatorTok{();}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ sigBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signerInfo}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignature}\OperatorTok{();}

            \CommentTok{// Request timestamp (see TsaClient class below)}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ tsToken }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ TsaClient}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ sigBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{            ASN1Primitive tsAsn1 }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                    ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fromByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsToken}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{            ASN1EncodableVector vec }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            vec}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signatureTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{,}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsAsn1}\OperatorTok{)));}
\NormalTok{            AttributeTable unsignedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{vec}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{            SignerInformation newSigner }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                    SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceUnsignedAttributes}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                            signerInfo}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ unsignedAttrs}\OperatorTok{);}

            \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceSigners}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedData}\OperatorTok{,}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{(}
                            \BuiltInTok{Collections}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{singletonList}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{newSigner}\OperatorTok{)));}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{// ── TSA client ───────────────────────────────────────────────────}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Minimal RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ TSA client}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ See Chapter }\CommentTok{18}\NormalTok{ for a full discussion of the timestamp protocol}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \DataTypeTok{static} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ TsaClient }\OperatorTok{\{}

        \DataTypeTok{static} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{getTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{,} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signatureBytes}\OperatorTok{)}
                \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ md }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ hash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ md}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signatureBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{            org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\NormalTok{ reqGen }\OperatorTok{=}
                    \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setCertReq}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{TimeStampRequest}\NormalTok{ tsReq }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                    reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ hash}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{            java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpClient}\NormalTok{ client }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                    java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpClient}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{newHttpClient}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\NormalTok{ request }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                    java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{newBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{uri}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{URI}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{create}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{))}
                            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{header}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Content{-}Type"}\OperatorTok{,}
                                    \StringTok{"application/timestamp{-}query"}\OperatorTok{)}
                            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{POST}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{BodyPublishers}
                                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsReq}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{()))}
                            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{            java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpResponse}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ response }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ client}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{send}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    request}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                    java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpResponse}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{BodyHandlers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofByteArray}\OperatorTok{());}

            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{statusCode}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{!=} \DecValTok{200}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TSA returned HTTP "}
                        \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{statusCode}\OperatorTok{());}
            \OperatorTok{\}}

\NormalTok{            org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{TimeStampResponse}\NormalTok{ tsResp }\OperatorTok{=}
                    \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{TimeStampResponse}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                            response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{body}\OperatorTok{());}
\NormalTok{            tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{validate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsReq}\OperatorTok{);}

            \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{();}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{// ── Appearance builder ───────────────────────────────────────────}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{buildTextAppearance}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDDocument doc}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                                      PDSignatureField sigField}\OperatorTok{,}
                                      \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ name}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ reason}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

\NormalTok{        PDRectangle rect }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ sigField}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getWidgets}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{isEmpty}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{?} \KeywordTok{null}
                \OperatorTok{:}\NormalTok{ sigField}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getWidgets}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{getRectangle}\OperatorTok{();}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{rect }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null} \OperatorTok{||}\NormalTok{ rect}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getWidth}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{1}
                \OperatorTok{||}\NormalTok{ rect}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getHeight}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{return}\OperatorTok{;}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \DataTypeTok{float}\NormalTok{ w }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ rect}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getWidth}\OperatorTok{();}
        \DataTypeTok{float}\NormalTok{ h }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ rect}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getHeight}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        PDResources resources }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PDResources}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        PDType1Font font }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PDType1Font}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                Standard14Fonts}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{FontName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HELVETICA}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        COSName fontName }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ resources}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{font}\OperatorTok{);}

        \DataTypeTok{float}\NormalTok{ fontSize }\OperatorTok{=} \FloatTok{9f}\OperatorTok{;}
        \DataTypeTok{float}\NormalTok{ y }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ h }\OperatorTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ fontSize }\OperatorTok{{-}} \DecValTok{3}\OperatorTok{;}
        \BuiltInTok{StringBuilder}\NormalTok{ ops }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{StringBuilder}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BT}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"/"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{fontName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getName}\OperatorTok{())}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{" "}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{fontSize}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{" Tf}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"0 0 0 rg}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"3 "}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{y}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{" Td}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"(Digitally signed by: "}\OperatorTok{)}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\FunctionTok{escapePs}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{name}\OperatorTok{)).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{") Tj}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{reason }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"0 {-}"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{fontSize }\OperatorTok{*} \FloatTok{1.3f}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{" Td}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"(Reason: "}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\FunctionTok{escapePs}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{reason}\OperatorTok{))}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{") Tj}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
\NormalTok{        ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{append}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"ET}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        PDFormXObject form }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PDFormXObject}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{doc}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        form}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setBBox}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PDRectangle}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{w}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ h}\OperatorTok{));}
\NormalTok{        form}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setResources}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{resources}\OperatorTok{);}
        \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{OutputStream}\NormalTok{ os }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ form}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getStream}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{createOutputStream}\OperatorTok{())} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            os}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{write}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ops}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{toString}\OperatorTok{()}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getBytes}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{StandardCharsets}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{US\_ASCII}\OperatorTok{));}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

\NormalTok{        COSDictionary apDict }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{COSDictionary}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        apDict}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{N}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ form}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        sigField}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getWidgets}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{getCOSObject}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{AP}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ apDict}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{// ── Certification ────────────────────────────────────────────────}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{applyCertification}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDDocument doc}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                                     PDSignature signature}\OperatorTok{,}
                                     \DataTypeTok{int}\NormalTok{ level}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \DataTypeTok{int}\NormalTok{ p }\OperatorTok{=} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{level }\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{1} \OperatorTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ level }\OperatorTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{3}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{?}\NormalTok{ level }\OperatorTok{:} \DecValTok{2}\OperatorTok{;}

\NormalTok{        COSDictionary sigRef }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{COSDictionary}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        sigRef}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{TYPE}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SigRef"}\OperatorTok{));}
\NormalTok{        sigRef}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TransformMethod"}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{                COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"DocMDP"}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{        COSDictionary params }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{COSDictionary}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        params}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{TYPE}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TransformParams"}\OperatorTok{));}
\NormalTok{        params}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"P"}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{                COSInteger}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{p}\OperatorTok{));}
\NormalTok{        params}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"V"}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{                COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"1.2"}\OperatorTok{));}
\NormalTok{        sigRef}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TransformParams"}\OperatorTok{),}\NormalTok{ params}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        COSArray refArray }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{COSArray}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        refArray}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigRef}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getCOSObject}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Reference"}\OperatorTok{),}\NormalTok{ refArray}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        COSDictionary perms }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{COSDictionary}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        perms}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"DocMDP"}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{                signature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getCOSObject}\OperatorTok{());}
\NormalTok{        doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getDocumentCatalog}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{getCOSObject}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setItem}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Perms"}\OperatorTok{),}\NormalTok{ perms}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{// ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────}

    \KeywordTok{private}\NormalTok{ PDSignatureField }\FunctionTok{findEmptySignatureField}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDAcroForm acroForm}\OperatorTok{,}
                                                      \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ fieldName}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \ControlFlowTok{for} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDField field }\OperatorTok{:}\NormalTok{ acroForm}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getFieldTree}\OperatorTok{())} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{field }\KeywordTok{instanceof}\NormalTok{ PDSignatureField sf}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ fqn }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ sf}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getFullyQualifiedName}\OperatorTok{();}
                \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ partial }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ sf}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPartialName}\OperatorTok{();}
                \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{((}\NormalTok{fieldName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{equals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{fqn}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{||}\NormalTok{ fieldName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{equals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{partial}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ sf}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignature}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
                    \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ sf}\OperatorTok{;}
                \OperatorTok{\}}
            \OperatorTok{\}}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
        \ControlFlowTok{return} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \KeywordTok{private} \BuiltInTok{String} \FunctionTok{extractCN}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ cert}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ dn }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ cert}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSubjectX500Principal}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{getName}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{regex}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Matcher}\NormalTok{ m }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{regex}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Pattern}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{compile}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"CN=([\^{},]+)"}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{regex}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Pattern}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{CASE\_INSENSITIVE}\OperatorTok{)}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{matcher}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dn}\OperatorTok{);}
        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ m}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{find}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{?}\NormalTok{ m}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{group}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{trim}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{:} \StringTok{"Unknown"}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static} \BuiltInTok{String} \FunctionTok{escapePs}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ text}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ text}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replace}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{,} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{"}\OperatorTok{)}
                   \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replace}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"("}\OperatorTok{,} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{("}\OperatorTok{)}
                   \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replace}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{")"}\OperatorTok{,} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{)"}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

This class covers the full production workflow. It produces PAdES-B-B
compliant signatures by default (with
\texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2} and \texttt{ETSI.CAdES.detached}),
upgrades to PAdES-B-T when a TSA URL is provided, supports visible and
invisible appearances, and handles certification signatures with DocMDP.

In the next chapter, we go deep into the BouncyCastle CMS construction
that powers the \texttt{PadesCmsCallback} --- every signed attribute,
every ASN.1 structure, every decision point that determines whether your
signature is a basic CMS blob or a fully PAdES-compliant
\texttt{SignedData}.

\chapter{BouncyCastle CMS
Construction}\label{_bouncycastle_cms_construction}

Chapter 29 showed how PDFBox orchestrates the signing
process --- creating the signature dictionary, computing the byte range,
calling your \texttt{sign()} method, and writing the result into
\texttt{/Contents}. This chapter goes inside that \texttt{sign()}
method. We are now in BouncyCastle territory, building the CMS
\texttt{SignedData} structure that is the actual cryptographic heart of
every PDF signature.

If you have ever looked at a CMS signature in an ASN.1 dump and wondered
what each field means, why certain attributes are mandatory for PAdES,
or how a timestamp token gets attached --- this chapter answers all of
those questions with complete, compilable code.

We cover: \texttt{CMSSignedDataGenerator} and its components, provider
registration, building the \texttt{ContentSigner}, the four mandatory
signed attributes for PAdES-B-B, the \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2}
attribute in detail, algorithm negotiation between RSA and ECDSA,
timestamp tokens as unsigned attributes, debugging CMS with ASN1Dump and
openssl, and complete builder classes for PAdES-B-B and PAdES-B-T.

\section{The CMS SignedData Structure: A Quick
Refresher}\label{_the_cms_signeddata_structure_a_quick_refresher}

Before we write code, let us recall what we are building. A CMS
\texttt{SignedData} structure (RFC 5652 --- Cryptographic Message Syntax
(CMS) S5) contains:

\begin{verbatim}
SignedData ::= SEQUENCE {
    version            CMSVersion,
    digestAlgorithms   SET OF AlgorithmIdentifier,
    encapContentInfo   EncapsulatedContentInfo,
    certificates    [0] IMPLICIT CertificateSet OPTIONAL,
    crls            [1] IMPLICIT RevocationInfoChoices OPTIONAL,
    signerInfos        SET OF SignerInfo
}
\end{verbatim}

For a PDF signature:

\begin{itemize}
\item
  \texttt{version} is 1 (one signer, detached content)
\item
  \texttt{digestAlgorithms} contains \texttt{SHA-256} (or SHA-384,
  SHA-512)
\item
  \texttt{encapContentInfo} has \texttt{contentType\ =\ id-data} and
  \emph{no content} (detached signature --- the content lives in the
  PDF)
\item
  \texttt{certificates} contains the signer's certificate and the chain
  (up to but not including the root)
\item
  \texttt{crls} is typically empty (revocation data goes in the DSS for
  PAdES-B-LT)
\item
  \texttt{signerInfos} contains exactly one \texttt{SignerInfo} with
  signed attributes, the signature value, and optionally unsigned
  attributes (the timestamp)
\end{itemize}

The \texttt{SignerInfo} is where most of the action is:

\begin{verbatim}
SignerInfo ::= SEQUENCE {
    version              CMSVersion,
    sid                  SignerIdentifier,
    digestAlgorithm      AlgorithmIdentifier,
    signedAttrs      [0] IMPLICIT SignedAttributes OPTIONAL,
    signatureAlgorithm   AlgorithmIdentifier,
    signature            SignatureValue,
    unsignedAttrs    [1] IMPLICIT UnsignedAttributes OPTIONAL
}
\end{verbatim}

The \texttt{signedAttrs} (signed attributes) are hashed and
signed --- they form the binding between the document content and the
signer's identity. The \texttt{unsignedAttrs} (unsigned attributes) are
\emph{not} covered by the signature --- this is where the timestamp
goes, because the timestamp is created \emph{after} the signature.

\section{BouncyCastle Provider
Registration}\label{_bouncycastle_provider_registration}

Every BouncyCastle crypto operation requires the provider to be
registered with the JCA (Java Cryptography Architecture). Without it,
calls to \texttt{JcaContentSignerBuilder},
\texttt{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}, and \texttt{JcaCertStore}
fail with \texttt{NoSuchProviderException}.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{provider}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{BouncyCastleProvider}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{// Register once, at application startup}
\ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{    java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{BouncyCastleProvider}\OperatorTok{());}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

In a Spring Boot application, the cleanest approach is a configuration
class:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{jakarta}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{annotation}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PostConstruct}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{provider}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{BouncyCastleProvider}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{springframework}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{context}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{annotation}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Configuration}\OperatorTok{;}

\AttributeTok{@Configuration}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ BouncyCastleConfig }\OperatorTok{\{}

    \AttributeTok{@PostConstruct}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{init}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Security}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{BouncyCastleProvider}\OperatorTok{());}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

If you register the provider in a \texttt{static} block, it races with
other static initializers. In complex applications with multiple
classloaders (application servers, OSGi), the provider may not be
visible where you need it. The \texttt{@PostConstruct} approach avoids
both problems.

You can verify the registration by calling
\texttt{java.security.Security.getProvider("BC")}. If it returns
\texttt{null}, BouncyCastle is not registered. If it returns a
\texttt{Provider} object, check its version:
\texttt{provider.getVersion()} should return \texttt{1.80} (or whatever
version you have on the classpath).

\section{Building a Basic CMS
Signature}\label{_building_a_basic_cms_signature}

Let us build a CMS \texttt{SignedData} from scratch, step by step. We
will start with the simplest possible version and then add PAdES
requirements.

\subsection{Step 1: The ContentSigner}\label{_step_1_the_contentsigner}

The \texttt{ContentSigner} is BouncyCastle's abstraction over the
private key and signature algorithm. It provides an
\texttt{OutputStream} that you write data into, and when you are done,
it produces the raw signature bytes.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ContentSigner}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{// For RSA keys:}
\NormalTok{ContentSigner signer }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA256withRSA"}\OperatorTok{)}
        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{)}
        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{privateKey}\OperatorTok{);}

\CommentTok{// For EC keys:}
\NormalTok{ContentSigner signer }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA256withECDSA"}\OperatorTok{)}
        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{)}
        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{privateKey}\OperatorTok{);}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

The \texttt{JcaContentSignerBuilder} takes a JCA algorithm string and a
private key. The \texttt{.setProvider("BC")} ensures BouncyCastle
handles the actual signing, not the JDK's default provider (which may
not support all algorithms or may behave differently for edge cases like
PSS padding).

\subsection{Step 2: The
DigestCalculatorProvider}\label{_step_2_the_digestcalculatorprovider}

BouncyCastle needs a way to compute message digests. The
\texttt{DigestCalculatorProvider} is the factory for digest calculators:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DigestCalculatorProvider}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}

\NormalTok{DigestCalculatorProvider dcProvider }\OperatorTok{=}
        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{)}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

This provider is used internally by the signer info generator to compute
the message digest of the signed content and the signed attributes.

\subsection{Step 3: The
SignerInfoGenerator}\label{_step_3_the_signerinfogenerator}

The \texttt{SignerInfoGenerator} combines the \texttt{ContentSigner},
the \texttt{DigestCalculatorProvider}, and the signer's certificate into
a component that can produce a \texttt{SignerInfo}:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}

\NormalTok{SignerInfoGenerator signerInfoGen }\OperatorTok{=}
        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dcProvider}\OperatorTok{)}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signer}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{);}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

At this point, the \texttt{signerInfoGen} knows which key to use, which
algorithm, which certificate identifies the signer, and how to compute
digests. It does \emph{not} yet know about signed attributes --- we will
add those next.

\subsection{Step 4: The
CMSSignedDataGenerator}\label{_step_4_the_cmssigneddatagenerator}

Now we wire everything together:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{// Certificate store {-}{-} signer cert + chain}
\BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ certList }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{ArrayList}\OperatorTok{\textless{}\textgreater{}(}\NormalTok{chain}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{JcaCertStore certStore }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certList}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator gen }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signerInfoGen}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addCertificates}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certStore}\OperatorTok{);} 

\CommentTok{// The content to be signed {-}{-} this is the byte range content from PDFBox}
\NormalTok{CMSProcessableByteArray cmsContent }\OperatorTok{=}
        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{contentBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

\CommentTok{// Generate the SignedData {-}{-} false = detached (content not embedded)}
\NormalTok{CMSSignedData signedData }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{cmsContent}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{false}\OperatorTok{);} 

\CommentTok{// Get the DER{-}encoded result}
\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ cmsBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{();}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  The certificates are embedded in the CMS \texttt{certificates} field.
  Include the signer's certificate and all intermediate certificates. Do
  \emph{not} include the root CA certificate --- validators are expected
  to have the root in their trust store already, and including it wastes
  space without adding trust.
\item
  The second parameter \texttt{false} means detached signature. For PDF
  signatures, this must always be \texttt{false}. If you pass
  \texttt{true}, the content is embedded inside the CMS structure, which
  doubles the size and does not match what PDF validators expect for
  \texttt{ETSI.CAdES.detached} or \texttt{adbe.pkcs7.detached}.
\end{itemize}

\section{Signed Attributes: What PAdES
Requires}\label{_signed_attributes_what_pades_requires}

A basic CMS signature (without signed attributes) signs the content
directly --- the hash of the content is what the signature covers. When
signed attributes are present, the signature covers the hash of the
\emph{signed attributes} instead, and the signed attributes contain the
hash of the content. This indirection is how CMS allows metadata
(signing time, content type, certificate binding) to be included in the
signed data.

For PAdES-B-B compliance (ETSI EN 319 142-1 V1.1.1 (2016-04)), four
signed attributes are required.

\begin{longtable}[]{@{}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 4\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2727}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 4\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2727}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 4\tabcolsep) * \real{0.4545}}@{}}
\caption{Mandatory Signed Attributes for PAdES-B-B}\tabularnewline
\toprule\noalign{}
\begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Attribute
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
OID
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Purpose
\end{minipage} \\
\midrule\noalign{}
\endfirsthead
\toprule\noalign{}
\begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Attribute
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
OID
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Purpose
\end{minipage} \\
\midrule\noalign{}
\endhead
\bottomrule\noalign{}
\endlastfoot
\texttt{content-type} & 1.2.840.113549.1.9.3 & Identifies the type of
content being signed. Must be \texttt{id-data} (OID
1.2.840.113549.1.7.1). BouncyCastle adds this automatically. \\
\texttt{message-digest} & 1.2.840.113549.1.9.4 & The hash of the signed
content (the byte range bytes). BouncyCastle computes and adds this
automatically. \\
\texttt{signing-time} & 1.2.840.113549.1.9.5 & The claimed signing time.
BouncyCastle adds this automatically when using
\texttt{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}. Note: PAdES validators
prefer the TSA timestamp over this value. \\
\texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2} & 1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.47 & Binds
the signature to a specific certificate by its hash. This is the one you
must add manually. Without it, you have a valid CMS signature but
\emph{not} a PAdES-B-B signature. \\
\end{longtable}

BouncyCastle's \texttt{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}
automatically adds \texttt{content-type}, \texttt{message-digest}, and
\texttt{signing-time}. You only need to explicitly construct
\texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2} and pass it in. The generator merges
your custom attributes with the automatic ones.

\section{Creating
ESS-signing-certificate-v2}\label{_creating_ess_signing_certificate_v2}

The \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2} attribute (RFC 5652 ---
Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS) and RFC 5035) prevents certificate
substitution attacks. It contains a hash of the signer's certificate, so
a validator can verify that the certificate embedded in the CMS
\texttt{certificates} field is the one the signer intended to use.

The ASN.1 structure:

\begin{verbatim}
SigningCertificateV2 ::= SEQUENCE {
    certs    SEQUENCE OF ESSCertIDv2,
    policies SEQUENCE OF PolicyInformation OPTIONAL
}

ESSCertIDv2 ::= SEQUENCE {
    hashAlgorithm  AlgorithmIdentifier DEFAULT {sha-256},
    certHash       OCTET STRING,
    issuerSerial   IssuerSerial OPTIONAL
}
\end{verbatim}

Here is the complete code to build this attribute:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{;}
