\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{nist}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pkcs}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{x509}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Builds the ESS}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{signing}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{certificate}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{v2 signed attribute}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ required for PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B compliance}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ EssCertAttributeBuilder }\OperatorTok{\{}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Creates an AttributeTable containing the}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ ESS}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{signing}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{certificate}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{v2 attribute}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{certificate}\CommentTok{ }\NormalTok{the signer}\CommentTok{\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{s X}\CommentTok{.509}\NormalTok{ certificate}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@return}\NormalTok{ an AttributeTable that can be passed to}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{         DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{static}\NormalTok{ AttributeTable }\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \CommentTok{// 1. Hash the DER{-}encoded certificate with SHA{-}256}
        \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ md }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ certHash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ md}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certificate}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());} 

        \CommentTok{// 2. Create the AlgorithmIdentifier for SHA{-}256}
\NormalTok{        AlgorithmIdentifier hashAlgo }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{);} 

        \CommentTok{// 3. Create the ESSCertIDv2 (hash + algorithm)}
\NormalTok{        ESSCertIDv2 essCertId }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{hashAlgo}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certHash}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 4. Wrap in SigningCertificateV2 (array of ESSCertIDv2)}
\NormalTok{        SigningCertificateV2 sigCertV2 }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{(}
                \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{essCertId}\OperatorTok{\});} 

        \CommentTok{// 5. Create the CMS Attribute}
\NormalTok{        ASN1EncodableVector v }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        v}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signingCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{,} 
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigCertV2}\OperatorTok{)));}

        \ControlFlowTok{return} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{v}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  \texttt{certificate.getEncoded()} returns the DER-encoded X.509
  certificate. We hash this entire byte sequence, not just the public
  key or the subject name. This ensures that any change to the
  certificate (even adding an extension) changes the hash.
\item
  The hash algorithm identifier must match the algorithm used to compute
  the hash. SHA-256 is the standard choice. If you use SHA-384 or
  SHA-512 for the signature algorithm, you may use the matching digest
  here, but SHA-256 is always acceptable.
\item
  The \texttt{SigningCertificateV2} wraps an array of
  \texttt{ESSCertIDv2}. For a single signer, there is one entry. If your
  signing certificate was issued by an intermediate CA, you may
  optionally include the intermediate's hash as well, but this is not
  required by PAdES.
\item
  The OID \texttt{1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.47} identifies this as the
  \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2} attribute. Do not confuse it with
  the older \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate} (v1, OID
  1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.12), which uses SHA-1. PAdES requires v2.
\end{itemize}

Using \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate} v1 (with SHA-1) instead of v2
(with SHA-256) is a PAdES compliance failure. Some older code examples
on the internet still use v1. SHA-1 is considered cryptographically
broken for collision resistance since the SHAttered attack (2017).
Always use v2 with SHA-256 or stronger.

\subsection{Wiring ESS-signing-certificate-v2 into the
Generator}\label{_wiring_ess_signing_certificate_v2_into_the_generator}

Now we pass the attribute table to the \texttt{SignerInfoGenerator}:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{// Build the ESS attribute table}
\NormalTok{AttributeTable essAttrs }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ EssCertAttributeBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certificate}\OperatorTok{);}

\CommentTok{// Create a generator that merges ESS attribute with the automatic ones}
\NormalTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator attrGen }\OperatorTok{=}
        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{essAttrs}\OperatorTok{);} 

\NormalTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder signerBuilder }\OperatorTok{=}
        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dcProvider}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSignedAttributeGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{attrGen}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{SignerInfoGenerator signerInfoGen }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{        signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signer}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{);}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  \texttt{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator} accepts an initial
  \texttt{AttributeTable} and \emph{merges} it with the attributes it
  generates automatically (\texttt{content-type},
  \texttt{message-digest}, \texttt{signing-time}). Your
  \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2} is included alongside the
  automatic attributes. You do not need to manually construct the other
  three.
\end{itemize}

\section{Algorithm Negotiation: RSA vs.
ECDSA}\label{_algorithm_negotiation_rsa_vs_ecdsa}

The signature algorithm depends on the private key type. You must match
the algorithm string to the key, or the \texttt{ContentSigner}
construction fails.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Determines the JCA signature algorithm string for a given private key}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Supports RSA}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ RSA}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{PSS}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ ECDSA}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ Ed25519}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ and Ed448}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{static} \BuiltInTok{String} \FunctionTok{resolveSignatureAlgorithm}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
    \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ keyAlgo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getAlgorithm}\OperatorTok{();}

    \ControlFlowTok{return} \ControlFlowTok{switch} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{keyAlgo}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"RSA"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"SHA256withRSA"}\OperatorTok{;}
        \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"RSASSA{-}PSS"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"SHA256withRSAandMGF1"}\OperatorTok{;} 
        \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"EC"}\OperatorTok{,} \StringTok{"ECDSA"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"SHA256withECDSA"}\OperatorTok{;}
        \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"Ed25519"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"Ed25519"}\OperatorTok{;} 
        \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"Ed448"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"Ed448"}\OperatorTok{;}
        \KeywordTok{default} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IllegalArgumentException}\OperatorTok{(}
                \StringTok{"Unsupported key algorithm: "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ keyAlgo}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\};}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  RSA-PSS (Probabilistic Signature Scheme) is increasingly preferred
  over PKCS\#1 v1.5 padding (\texttt{SHA256withRSA}). Some EU validation
  services flag PKCS\#1 v1.5 as deprecated. If your key was generated as
  RSASSA-PSS, you must use the PSS algorithm string.
\item
  Ed25519 and Ed448 (Edwards curves) use the algorithm name
  directly --- there is no separate hash algorithm because the hash is
  built into the signature scheme. These are not yet widely supported by
  PDF validators (Adobe Acrobat does not validate Ed25519 signatures as
  of 2026), but they are valid per ISO 32000-2:2020 and will gain
  support over time.
\end{itemize}

\begin{longtable}[]{@{}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.1818}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2727}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2727}}
  >{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{(\linewidth - 6\tabcolsep) * \real{0.2727}}@{}}
\caption{Signature Algorithm Matrix}\tabularnewline
\toprule\noalign{}
\begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Key Type
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Algorithm String
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Hash
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Notes
\end{minipage} \\
\midrule\noalign{}
\endfirsthead
\toprule\noalign{}
\begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Key Type
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Algorithm String
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Hash
\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Notes
\end{minipage} \\
\midrule\noalign{}
\endhead
\bottomrule\noalign{}
\endlastfoot
RSA-2048+ & \texttt{SHA256withRSA} & SHA-256 & Most compatible. Works
everywhere. \\
RSA-2048+ & \texttt{SHA256withRSAandMGF1} & SHA-256 & RSA-PSS. Better
security properties. Some legacy validators do not support it. \\
RSA-3072+ & \texttt{SHA384withRSA} & SHA-384 & For higher security
requirements. \\
EC P-256 & \texttt{SHA256withECDSA} & SHA-256 & Compact signatures (64
bytes vs. 256 for RSA-2048). Widely supported. \\
EC P-384 & \texttt{SHA384withECDSA} & SHA-384 & Higher security
level. \\
EC P-521 & \texttt{SHA512withECDSA} & SHA-512 & Maximum EC security.
Rarely needed. \\
Ed25519 & \texttt{Ed25519} & Built-in & Modern curve. Limited validator
support (as of 2026). \\
Ed448 & \texttt{Ed448} & Built-in & Higher security Ed curve. Very
limited support. \\
\end{longtable}

For maximum compatibility in 2026, use \texttt{SHA256withRSA} (RSA-2048
key) or \texttt{SHA256withECDSA} (P-256 key). These work with every PDF
validator we have tested, including Adobe Acrobat, Foxit Reader, and the
EU DSS validation service.

\section{Timestamp Token as Unsigned
Attribute}\label{_timestamp_token_as_unsigned_attribute}

A PAdES-B-T signature contains a timestamp token as an unsigned
attribute on the \texttt{SignerInfo}. The timestamp proves when the
signature was created.

The attribute is identified by OID \texttt{1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.14}
(\texttt{id-aa-signatureTimeStampToken}), and its value is a complete
CMS \texttt{SignedData} structure --- the timestamp is itself a CMS
signature, created by the TSA.

\subsection{The Timestamping Flow}\label{_the_timestamping_flow}

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\item
  Generate the CMS \texttt{SignedData} for the document signature
  (PAdES-B-B)
\item
  Extract the raw signature value (\texttt{SignerInfo.signature})
\item
  Hash the signature value with SHA-256
\item
  Send the hash to the TSA in an RFC 3161 \texttt{TimeStampRequest}
\item
  Receive the \texttt{TimeStampResponse}, extract the
  \texttt{TimeStampToken}
\item
  Encode the token as an ASN.1 structure
\item
  Attach it as an unsigned attribute on the \texttt{SignerInfo}
\item
  Replace the \texttt{SignerInfo} in the \texttt{CMSSignedData}
\item
  Return the modified \texttt{CMSSignedData}
\end{enumerate}

\subsection{Complete Implementation}\label{_complete_implementation}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Collections}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{nist}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pkcs}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampRequest}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampResponse}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Adds an RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ timestamp to a CMS SignedData}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ upgrading it}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ from PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B to PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{T}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ TimestampEmbedder }\OperatorTok{\{}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Embeds a timestamp token as an unsigned attribute}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{signedData}\CommentTok{ }\NormalTok{the original CMS SignedData }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{)}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{tsaUrl}\CommentTok{     }\NormalTok{the RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ TSA endpoint URL}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@return}\NormalTok{ the modified CMS SignedData }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{T}\CommentTok{)}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{static}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData }\FunctionTok{addTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSSignedData signedData}\OperatorTok{,}
                                              \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \CommentTok{// Get the first (only) signer info}
\NormalTok{        SignerInformation signerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSigners}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{iterator}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{next}\OperatorTok{();}

        \CommentTok{// The timestamp covers the signature value, not the content}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signatureBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signerInfo}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignature}\OperatorTok{();} 

        \CommentTok{// Hash the signature for the TSA request}
        \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ md }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ hash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ md}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signatureBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Build and send the RFC 3161 request}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequestGenerator reqGen }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setCertReq}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{);} 
\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequest tsReq }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ hash}\OperatorTok{);}

        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ tsRespBytes }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{sendTsaRequest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ tsReq}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}

        \CommentTok{// Parse and validate the response}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampResponse tsResponse }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampResponse}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsRespBytes}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        tsResponse}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{validate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsReq}\OperatorTok{);} 

\NormalTok{        TimeStampToken tsToken }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsResponse}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{();}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsToken }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IllegalStateException}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \StringTok{"TSA response contains no timestamp token"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \CommentTok{// Convert to ASN.1 for embedding}
\NormalTok{        ASN1Primitive tsAsn1 }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fromByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                tsToken}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}

        \CommentTok{// Build the unsigned attribute}
\NormalTok{        ASN1EncodableVector unsignedVec }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        unsignedVec}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signatureTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{,}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsAsn1}\OperatorTok{)));} 
\NormalTok{        AttributeTable unsignedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{unsignedVec}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Replace the signer\textquotesingle{}s unsigned attributes}
\NormalTok{        SignerInformation newSignerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceUnsignedAttributes}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                        signerInfo}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ unsignedAttrs}\OperatorTok{);} 

\NormalTok{        SignerInformationStore newSignerInfos }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{(}
                        \BuiltInTok{Collections}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{singletonList}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{newSignerInfo}\OperatorTok{));}

        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceSigners}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                signedData}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ newSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{/**}\NormalTok{ Sends an RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ request to a TSA endpoint via HTTP POST}\CommentTok{. */}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{sendTsaRequest}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{,} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ reqBytes}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

\NormalTok{        java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpClient}\NormalTok{ client }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpClient}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{newBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{connectTimeout}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{time}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Duration}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofSeconds}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{15}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\NormalTok{ request }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{newBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{uri}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{URI}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{create}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{header}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Content{-}Type"}\OperatorTok{,}
                                \StringTok{"application/timestamp{-}query"}\OperatorTok{)}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{timeout}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{time}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Duration}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofSeconds}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{30}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{POST}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{BodyPublishers}
                                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{reqBytes}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpResponse}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ response }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ client}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{send}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                request}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpResponse}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{BodyHandlers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofByteArray}\OperatorTok{());}

        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{statusCode}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{!=} \DecValTok{200}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \StringTok{"TSA returned HTTP "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{statusCode}\OperatorTok{()}
                            \OperatorTok{+} \StringTok{" from "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ body }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{body}\OperatorTok{();}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{body }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null} \OperatorTok{||}\NormalTok{ body}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{length} \OperatorTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \StringTok{"TSA returned empty response from "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ body}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  \texttt{getSignature()} returns the raw signature bytes from the
  \texttt{SignerInfo} --- this is the value that was produced by the
  \texttt{ContentSigner}. For RSA-2048, this is 256 bytes. For ECDSA
  P-256, it is approximately 72 bytes (DER-encoded).
\item
  \texttt{setCertReq(true)} tells the TSA to include its signing
  certificate in the response. This is important: without the TSA's
  certificate, a validator cannot verify the timestamp without
  separately fetching the TSA's certificate.
\item
  \texttt{validate()} checks that the response corresponds to our
  request (matching nonce, hash algorithm, and hash value). If the TSA
  returned a response for a different request, this throws a
  \texttt{TSPValidationException}.
\item
  The timestamp token is wrapped in a \texttt{DERSet} and assigned OID
  \texttt{1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.14}. This is the standard way to embed
  a timestamp in CMS (RFC 5652 --- Cryptographic Message Syntax (CMS)).
\item
  \texttt{replaceUnsignedAttributes()} creates a new
  \texttt{SignerInformation} with the same signed attributes and
  signature value, but with the specified unsigned attributes. The
  original \texttt{SignerInformation} is immutable.
\end{itemize}

\section{Debugging CMS Structures}\label{_debugging_cms_structures}

When a signature fails validation, you need to look inside the CMS blob.
There are two indispensable tools: BouncyCastle's \texttt{ASN1Dump}
(Java) and OpenSSL (command line).

\subsection{ASN1Dump: Java-Side
Inspection}\label{_asn1dump_java_side_inspection}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1InputStream}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1Dump}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Dumps the ASN}\CommentTok{.1}\NormalTok{ structure of a CMS blob to stdout}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Invaluable for debugging signature construction}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{static} \DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{dumpCms}\OperatorTok{(}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ cmsBytes}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
    \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ASN1InputStream asn1In }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1InputStream}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{cmsBytes}\OperatorTok{))} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{        ASN1Primitive obj }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ asn1In}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{readObject}\OperatorTok{();}
        \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ dump }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ ASN1Dump}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{dumpAsString}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{obj}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{);} 
        \BuiltInTok{System}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{out}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{println}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dump}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  The \texttt{true} parameter enables verbose mode, which shows the full
  content of OCTET STRING and BIT STRING values. Without it, large
  values are truncated.
\end{itemize}

The output looks like this (truncated for readability):

\begin{verbatim}
SEQUENCE
  OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.7.2    (signedData)
  [0]
    SEQUENCE
      INTEGER 1                               (version)
      SET
        SEQUENCE
          OBJECT IDENTIFIER 2.16.840.1.101.3.4.2.1 (SHA-256)
      SEQUENCE
        OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.7.1     (data)
      [0]                                     (certificates)
        SEQUENCE
          ...                                 (X.509 certificate)
      SET
        SEQUENCE                              (SignerInfo)
          INTEGER 1                           (version)
          SEQUENCE                            (sid - issuerAndSerialNumber)
            ...
          SEQUENCE                            (digestAlgorithm)
            OBJECT IDENTIFIER 2.16.840.1.101.3.4.2.1 (SHA-256)
          [0]                                 (signedAttrs)
            SEQUENCE
              OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.9.3  (content-type)
              ...
            SEQUENCE
              OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.9.4  (message-digest)
              ...
            SEQUENCE
              OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.9.5  (signing-time)
              ...
            SEQUENCE
              OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.47 (ESS-signing-cert-v2)
              ...
          SEQUENCE                            (signatureAlgorithm)
            OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.1.1 (RSA)
          OCTET STRING                        (signature value)
            ...
          [1]                                 (unsignedAttrs)
            SEQUENCE
              OBJECT IDENTIFIER 1.2.840.113549.1.9.16.2.14 (timestamp)
              ...
\end{verbatim}

When debugging, check for:

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\item
  Is \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2} (OID \ldots\hspace{0pt}16.2.47)
  present in the signed attributes? If not, the signature is not
  PAdES-B-B compliant.
\item
  Is \texttt{message-digest} present? If not, the signature structure is
  malformed.
\item
  Is the timestamp (OID \ldots\hspace{0pt}16.2.14) in the unsigned
  attributes? If not, it is not PAdES-B-T.
\item
  Are certificates present in the \texttt{{[}0{]}} IMPLICIT set? If not,
  validators cannot build the chain.
\end{enumerate}

\subsection{OpenSSL: Command-Line
Inspection}\label{_openssl_command_line_inspection}

Extract the CMS blob from the PDF (it is the hex-encoded content of
\texttt{/Contents}), decode it, and use OpenSSL:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Decode the hex string from /Contents to binary}
\ExtensionTok{xxd} \AttributeTok{{-}r} \AttributeTok{{-}p}\NormalTok{ signature{-}hex.txt }\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ signature.der}

\CommentTok{\# Parse the CMS structure}
\ExtensionTok{openssl}\NormalTok{ cms }\AttributeTok{{-}inform}\NormalTok{ DER }\AttributeTok{{-}in}\NormalTok{ signature.der }\AttributeTok{{-}cmsout} \AttributeTok{{-}print}

\CommentTok{\# Verify the CMS signature (requires the signed content)}
\ExtensionTok{openssl}\NormalTok{ cms }\AttributeTok{{-}verify} \AttributeTok{{-}inform}\NormalTok{ DER }\AttributeTok{{-}in}\NormalTok{ signature.der }\DataTypeTok{\textbackslash{}}
    \AttributeTok{{-}content}\NormalTok{ signed{-}bytes.bin }\AttributeTok{{-}noverify} \AttributeTok{{-}out}\NormalTok{ /dev/null}

\CommentTok{\# Extract and examine the signing certificate}
\ExtensionTok{openssl}\NormalTok{ cms }\AttributeTok{{-}inform}\NormalTok{ DER }\AttributeTok{{-}in}\NormalTok{ signature.der }\AttributeTok{{-}cmsout} \AttributeTok{{-}print} \DataTypeTok{\textbackslash{}}
    \KeywordTok{|} \FunctionTok{grep} \AttributeTok{{-}A}\NormalTok{ 50 }\StringTok{"cert:"}

\CommentTok{\# View the timestamp token (if present)}
\ExtensionTok{openssl}\NormalTok{ ts }\AttributeTok{{-}reply} \AttributeTok{{-}in}\NormalTok{ timestamp{-}token.der }\AttributeTok{{-}text}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

To extract the \texttt{/Contents} hex string from a PDF, search for
\texttt{/Contents\ \textless{}} in the raw file. The hex string starts
after the \texttt{\textless{}} and ends at \texttt{\textgreater{}}. It
is zero-padded --- strip trailing zeros before decoding. You can also
use PDFBox's \texttt{PDSignature.getContents(byte{[}{]})} to extract the
raw bytes programmatically.

\section{Complete PAdES-B-B Builder}\label{_complete_pades_b_b_builder}

Here is a self-contained class that builds a PAdES-B-B compliant CMS
\texttt{SignedData}:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{InputStream}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PrivateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ArrayList}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{List}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{nist}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pkcs}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{x509}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ContentSigner}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DigestCalculatorProvider}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Builds a PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B compliant CMS SignedData structure}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Implements SignatureInterface for use with PDFBox}\CommentTok{\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{s}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ PDDocument}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{addSignature}\CommentTok{().}
 \CommentTok{*}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Produces}\CommentTok{:}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ Detached CMS SignedData }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{SubFilter}\CommentTok{:}\NormalTok{ ETSI}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{CAdES}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{detached}\CommentTok{)}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ Signed attributes}\CommentTok{:}\NormalTok{ content}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{type}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ message}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{digest}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ signing}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{time}\CommentTok{,}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{   ESS}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{signing}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{certificate}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{v2}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ Certificate chain embedded in CMS certificates field}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ PadesBBBuilder}
        \KeywordTok{implements}\NormalTok{ org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{interactive}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{SignatureInterface} \OperatorTok{\{}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{;}

    \KeywordTok{public} \FunctionTok{PadesBBBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{,}
                           \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{,}
                           \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{privateKey} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{certificate} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{chain} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \AttributeTok{@Override}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{sign}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{InputStream}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{IOException} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ contentBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{readAllBytes}\OperatorTok{();}
            \ControlFlowTok{return} \FunctionTok{buildSignedData}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{contentBytes}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}} \ControlFlowTok{catch} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{IOException}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{;}
        \OperatorTok{\}} \ControlFlowTok{catch} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{Exception}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"PAdES{-}B{-}B signing failed: "}
                    \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getMessage}\OperatorTok{(),}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Builds the CMS SignedData from the byte range content}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ This method can also be called directly for testing}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{buildSignedData}\OperatorTok{(}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ contentBytes}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \CommentTok{// 1. Determine signature algorithm}
        \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ sigAlgo }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{resolveAlgorithm}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{privateKey}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 2. Content signer}
\NormalTok{        ContentSigner signer }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigAlgo}\OperatorTok{)}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{)}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{privateKey}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 3. Digest calculator provider}
\NormalTok{        DigestCalculatorProvider dcProvider }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

        \CommentTok{// 4. ESS{-}signing{-}certificate{-}v2 attribute}
\NormalTok{        AttributeTable essAttrs }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{buildEssAttribute}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certificate}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 5. Signer info generator with custom signed attributes}
\NormalTok{        JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder signerBuilder }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dcProvider}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSignedAttributeGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{essAttrs}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{        SignerInfoGenerator signerInfoGen }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signer}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 6. Certificate store}
        \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ certs }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{ArrayList}\OperatorTok{\textless{}\textgreater{}(}\NormalTok{chain}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        JcaCertStore certStore }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certs}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 7. Assemble and generate}
\NormalTok{        CMSSignedDataGenerator gen }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signerInfoGen}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addCertificates}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certStore}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        CMSProcessableByteArray cmsContent }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{contentBytes}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        CMSSignedData signedData }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{cmsContent}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{false}\OperatorTok{);}

        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{();}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static}\NormalTok{ AttributeTable }\FunctionTok{buildEssAttribute}\OperatorTok{(}
            \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ cert}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ md }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ certHash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ md}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{        AlgorithmIdentifier hashAlgo }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        ESSCertIDv2 essCertId }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{hashAlgo}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certHash}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        SigningCertificateV2 sigCertV2 }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{(}
                \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{essCertId}\OperatorTok{\});}

\NormalTok{        ASN1EncodableVector v }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        v}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signingCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{,}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigCertV2}\OperatorTok{)));}
        \ControlFlowTok{return} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{v}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static} \BuiltInTok{String} \FunctionTok{resolveAlgorithm}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ key}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ algo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ key}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getAlgorithm}\OperatorTok{();}
        \ControlFlowTok{return} \ControlFlowTok{switch} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{algo}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"RSA"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"SHA256withRSA"}\OperatorTok{;}
            \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"RSASSA{-}PSS"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"SHA256withRSAandMGF1"}\OperatorTok{;}
            \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"EC"}\OperatorTok{,} \StringTok{"ECDSA"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"SHA256withECDSA"}\OperatorTok{;}
            \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"Ed25519"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"Ed25519"}\OperatorTok{;}
            \ControlFlowTok{case} \StringTok{"Ed448"} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \StringTok{"Ed448"}\OperatorTok{;}
            \KeywordTok{default} \OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IllegalArgumentException}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \StringTok{"Unsupported key algorithm: "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ algo}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\};}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Complete PAdES-B-T Builder}\label{_complete_pades_b_t_builder}

The PAdES-B-T builder extends B-B by adding a timestamp after the
signature is generated:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{InputStream}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PrivateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Collections}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{List}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{nist}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pkcs}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampRequest}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampResponse}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Builds a PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{T compliant CMS SignedData structure}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Extends PAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{B by adding an RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ timestamp token}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ as an unsigned attribute on the SignerInfo}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Usage with PDFBox}\CommentTok{:}
 \CommentTok{*} \DataTypeTok{\textless{}}\KeywordTok{pre}\DataTypeTok{\textgreater{}}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ PadesBTBuilder builder }\CommentTok{=}\NormalTok{ new PadesBTBuilder}\CommentTok{(}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{     privateKey}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificate}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ chain}\CommentTok{,} \CommentTok{"}\NormalTok{http}\CommentTok{://}\NormalTok{tsa}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{example}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{com}\CommentTok{");}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ doc}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{addSignature}\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{signature}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ builder}\CommentTok{,}\NormalTok{ options}\CommentTok{);}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ doc}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{saveIncremental}\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{outputStream}\CommentTok{);}
 \CommentTok{*} \DataTypeTok{\textless{}/}\KeywordTok{pre}\DataTypeTok{\textgreater{}}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ PadesBTBuilder}
        \KeywordTok{implements}\NormalTok{ org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{interactive}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{SignatureInterface} \OperatorTok{\{}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final}\NormalTok{ PadesBBBuilder bbBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{;}

    \KeywordTok{public} \FunctionTok{PadesBTBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{,}
                           \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{,}
                           \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{,}
                           \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{bbBuilder} \OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PadesBBBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                privateKey}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificate}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ chain}\OperatorTok{);}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsaUrl} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \AttributeTok{@Override}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{sign}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{InputStream}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{IOException} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ contentBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{readAllBytes}\OperatorTok{();}

            \CommentTok{// Step 1: Build PAdES{-}B{-}B SignedData}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ bbBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ bbBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{buildSignedData}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{contentBytes}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            CMSSignedData signedData }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{bbBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

            \CommentTok{// Step 2: Add timestamp}
\NormalTok{            CMSSignedData timestamped }\OperatorTok{=}
                    \FunctionTok{embedTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedData}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{);}

            \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ timestamped}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{();}
        \OperatorTok{\}} \ControlFlowTok{catch} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{IOException}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{;}
        \OperatorTok{\}} \ControlFlowTok{catch} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{Exception}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"PAdES{-}B{-}T signing failed: "}
                    \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getMessage}\OperatorTok{(),}\NormalTok{ e}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData }\FunctionTok{embedTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            CMSSignedData signedData}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \CommentTok{// Extract signature value}
\NormalTok{        SignerInformation signerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSigners}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{iterator}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{next}\OperatorTok{();}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ sigBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signerInfo}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignature}\OperatorTok{();}

        \CommentTok{// Hash for TSA request}
        \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ md }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ hash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ md}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Build RFC 3161 request}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequestGenerator reqGen }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setCertReq}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequest tsReq }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ hash}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Send to TSA}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ tsRespBytes }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{sendTsaRequest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ tsReq}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}

        \CommentTok{// Parse and validate}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampResponse tsResp }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampResponse}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsRespBytes}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{validate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsReq}\OperatorTok{);}

        \DataTypeTok{int}\NormalTok{ status }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getStatus}\OperatorTok{();}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{status }\OperatorTok{!=} \DecValTok{0} \OperatorTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ status }\OperatorTok{!=} \DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{} 
            \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ msg }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getStatusString}\OperatorTok{();}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TSA error: "}
                    \OperatorTok{+} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{msg }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null} \OperatorTok{?}\NormalTok{ msg }\OperatorTok{:} \StringTok{"status="} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ status}\OperatorTok{));}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

\NormalTok{        TimeStampToken tsToken }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{();}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsToken }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TSA returned no timestamp token"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \CommentTok{// Embed as unsigned attribute}
\NormalTok{        ASN1Primitive tsAsn1 }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ ASN1Primitive}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fromByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                tsToken}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{        ASN1EncodableVector vec }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        vec}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signatureTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{,}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsAsn1}\OperatorTok{)));}
\NormalTok{        AttributeTable unsignedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{vec}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        SignerInformation newSignerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                SignerInformation}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceUnsignedAttributes}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                        signerInfo}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ unsignedAttrs}\OperatorTok{);}

        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceSigners}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedData}\OperatorTok{,}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignerInformationStore}\OperatorTok{(}
                        \BuiltInTok{Collections}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{singletonList}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{newSignerInfo}\OperatorTok{)));}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{static} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{sendTsaRequest}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{,} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ reqBytes}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

\NormalTok{        java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpClient}\NormalTok{ client }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpClient}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{newBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{connectTimeout}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{time}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Duration}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofSeconds}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{15}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{followRedirects}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                                java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpClient}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Redirect}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{NORMAL}\OperatorTok{)}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\NormalTok{ request }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{newBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{uri}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{URI}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{create}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{header}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Content{-}Type"}\OperatorTok{,}
                                \StringTok{"application/timestamp{-}query"}\OperatorTok{)}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{timeout}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{time}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Duration}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofSeconds}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{30}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{POST}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpRequest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{BodyPublishers}
                                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{reqBytes}\OperatorTok{))}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpResponse}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ response }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ client}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{send}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                request}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                java}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{http}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HttpResponse}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{BodyHandlers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofByteArray}\OperatorTok{());}

        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{statusCode}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{!=} \DecValTok{200}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TSA HTTP "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{statusCode}\OperatorTok{()}
                    \OperatorTok{+} \StringTok{" from "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ body }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{body}\OperatorTok{();}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{body }\OperatorTok{==} \KeywordTok{null} \OperatorTok{||}\NormalTok{ body}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{length} \OperatorTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \ControlFlowTok{throw} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{IOException}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"TSA empty response from "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ body}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  TSA status 0 = \texttt{granted}, 1 = \texttt{grantedWithMods}. Any
  other status (2 = rejection, 3 = waiting, 4 = revocationWarning, 5 =
  revocationNotification) means the TSA refused to issue a timestamp.
  Handle this gracefully --- some TSAs reject requests during
  maintenance windows.
\end{itemize}

\section{CMS Construction for Remote Signing (CSC
API)}\label{_cms_construction_for_remote_signing_csc_api}

When using a remote signing service via the CSC API (Chapter 22), you
cannot use BouncyCastle's \texttt{CMSSignedDataGenerator} in the normal
way --- because you do not have the private key locally. The generator
expects a \texttt{ContentSigner} that performs the signing operation,
but with CSC, the signing happens on a remote HSM. You must build the
CMS \texttt{SignedData} structure \emph{manually} using BouncyCastle's
low-level ASN.1 classes.

\subsection{The Challenge}\label{_the_challenge}

The remote signing flow splits the CMS construction into three phases:

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\item
  \textbf{Build signed attributes} (local) --- content-type,
  message-digest, ESS-signing-certificate-v2
\item
  \textbf{Hash and send to CSC} (remote) --- the server signs the
  DER-encoded signed attributes hash
\item
  \textbf{Assemble CMS} (local) --- combine the signed attributes, the
  remote signature value, and the certificate chain into a valid
  \texttt{SignedData} structure
\end{enumerate}

Phase 2 returns raw signature bytes --- not a CMS structure, not a
PKCS\#7 blob, just the naked RSA or ECDSA signature value. You must wrap
those bytes into a complete CMS \texttt{SignedData} yourself.

\subsection{Manual CMS Assembly}\label{_manual_cms_assembly}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Assembles a CMS SignedData structure from pre}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{computed components}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Used when the signature value comes from a remote signing service}
 \CommentTok{*} \CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{CSC API}\CommentTok{)}\NormalTok{ and the CMS must be constructed locally}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{assembleCmsForRemoteSigning}\OperatorTok{(}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ contentHash}\OperatorTok{,}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ remoteSignatureValue}\OperatorTok{,}
        \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ signerCert}\OperatorTok{,}
        \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ certChain}\OperatorTok{,}
        \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ signAlgoOid}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

    \CommentTok{// {-}{-}{-} 1. Build the signed attributes {-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{    ASN1EncodableVector signedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}

    \CommentTok{// content{-}type = id{-}data}
\NormalTok{    signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            CMSAttributes}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{contentType}\OperatorTok{,}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{data}\OperatorTok{)));}

    \CommentTok{// message{-}digest = hash of byte range content}
\NormalTok{    signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            CMSAttributes}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{messageDigest}\OperatorTok{,}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DEROctetString}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{contentHash}\OperatorTok{))));}

    \CommentTok{// signing{-}time}
\NormalTok{    signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            CMSAttributes}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{signingTime}\OperatorTok{,}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1UTCTime}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Date}\OperatorTok{()))));}

    \CommentTok{// ESS{-}signing{-}certificate{-}v2 (mandatory for PAdES)}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ certHash }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{)}
            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signerCert}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}
\NormalTok{    ESSCertIDv2 essCertId }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{(}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{            certHash}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signingCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{,}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{essCertId}\OperatorTok{\}))));}

\NormalTok{    DERSet signedAttrSet }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// {-}{-}{-} 2. Build the SignerInfo {-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{    X509CertificateHolder certHolder }\OperatorTok{=}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaX509CertificateHolder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signerCert}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    IssuerAndSerialNumber issuerAndSerial }\OperatorTok{=}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{IssuerAndSerialNumber}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    certHolder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getIssuer}\OperatorTok{(),}
\NormalTok{                    certHolder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSerialNumber}\OperatorTok{());}

    \CommentTok{// Determine digest algorithm from signature algorithm}
\NormalTok{    AlgorithmIdentifier digestAlgId }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    AlgorithmIdentifier sigAlgId }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1ObjectIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signAlgoOid}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{    SignerInfo signerInfo }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignerInfo}\OperatorTok{(}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignerIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{issuerAndSerial}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{            digestAlgId}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{            signedAttrSet}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{            sigAlgId}\OperatorTok{,}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DEROctetString}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{remoteSignatureValue}\OperatorTok{),}
            \KeywordTok{null}  \CommentTok{// no unsigned attributes yet (added later for B{-}T)}
    \OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// {-}{-}{-} 3. Build the certificate set {-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{    ASN1EncodableVector certVector }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
    \ControlFlowTok{for} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ cert }\OperatorTok{:}\NormalTok{ certChain}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{        certVector}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                org}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{x509}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{Certificate}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                        cert}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{()));}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{// {-}{-}{-} 4. Assemble the SignedData {-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{    ASN1EncodableVector digestAlgIds }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1EncodableVector}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{    digestAlgIds}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{digestAlgId}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{    SignedData signedData }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SignedData}\OperatorTok{(}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{digestAlgIds}\OperatorTok{),}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ContentInfo}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{data}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{),} \CommentTok{// detached}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{BERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certVector}\OperatorTok{),}
