\end{minipage} & \begin{minipage}[b]{\linewidth}\raggedright
Notes
\end{minipage} \\
\midrule\noalign{}
\endhead
\bottomrule\noalign{}
\endlastfoot
Basic PKCS\#7 (adbe.pkcs7.detached) & OK & OK & OK & OK & OK & Baseline
--- everything should pass \\
Basic PAdES (ETSI.CAdES.detached) & OK & OK & OK & OK & OK & Same as
PKCS\#7 but with PAdES SubFilter \\
PAdES with timestamp & OK & OK & OK & OK & OK & Timestamp attribute
present and valid \\
Self-signed certificate & OK & OK & OK & FAIL & FAIL & CMS is valid but
chain has no trusted root \\
Expired certificate (no timestamp) & OK & OK & OK & FAIL & FAIL &
CertPathValidator rejects expired cert \\
Expired certificate (with timestamp) & OK & OK & OK & OK & OK &
Timestamp proves signing was within validity \\
Multi-signature document & WARN & OK & OK & OK & OK & First sig has
trailing bytes (second revision) \\
Tampered after signing & OK & FAIL &  ---  &  ---  &  ---  & Hash
mismatch --- document was modified \\
Missing intermediate certificate & OK & OK & OK & FAIL & FAIL & Chain
cannot be built without intermediate \\
Revoked certificate & OK & OK & OK & FAIL & FAIL & Requires OCSP/CRL
mock returning "revoked" \\
Wrong SubFilter for content & OK & OK & OK & OK & OK & SubFilter says
PAdES but ESS attr is missing \\
Empty /Contents (zero-length CMS) & OK & FAIL & FAIL &  ---  &  ---  &
CMSException during parsing \\
Invisible signature (zero-size widget) & OK & OK & OK & OK & OK &
Cryptographically identical to visible sig \\
\end{longtable}

Each row in this matrix translates directly to a test method. The "-\/-"
entries mean that step is not reached because an earlier step failed
fatally.

\section{Mocking TSA and OCSP}\label{_mocking_tsa_and_ocsp}

\subsection{In-Process TSA with
BouncyCastle}\label{_in_process_tsa_with_bouncycastle}

For timestamp tests, we need a TSA that returns deterministic timestamp
tokens without hitting the network. BouncyCastle provides everything you
need to build one in-process:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ In}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{process TSA for testing}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Produces valid RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ timestamp tokens using the test TSA key}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\AttributeTok{@Slf4j}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ InProcessTsa }\OperatorTok{\{}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ tsaKey}\OperatorTok{;}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ tsaCert}\OperatorTok{;}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{AtomicLong}\NormalTok{ serialNumber }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{AtomicLong}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{);}

    \KeywordTok{public} \FunctionTok{InProcessTsa}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ tsaKey}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ tsaCert}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsaKey} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsaKey}\OperatorTok{;}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{tsaCert} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsaCert}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Generate a timestamp token for the given data hash}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public}\NormalTok{ TimeStampToken }\FunctionTok{timestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ dataToTimestamp}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ digest }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ hash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ digest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dataToTimestamp}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequestGenerator reqGen }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setCertReq}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequest request }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{TSPAlgorithms}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{SHA256}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ hash}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Build the timestamp token}
\NormalTok{        JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder sigGenBuilder }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}
                        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{        ContentSigner contentSigner }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}
                \StringTok{"SHA256withRSA"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaKey}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        SignerInfoGenerator sigGen }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ sigGenBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                contentSigner}\OperatorTok{,}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaX509CertificateHolder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaCert}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{        DigestCalculatorProvider dcProv }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        DigestCalculator dgCalc }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                dcProv}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{        TimeStampTokenGenerator tsTokenGen }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampTokenGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigGen}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ dgCalc}\OperatorTok{,}
                        \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ASN1ObjectIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"1.2.3.4.5"}\OperatorTok{));} \CommentTok{// Test policy}
\NormalTok{        tsTokenGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addCertificates}\OperatorTok{(}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{of}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaCert}\OperatorTok{)));}

\NormalTok{        TimeStampResponseGenerator tsRespGen }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampResponseGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsTokenGen}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                        TSPAlgorithms}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ALLOWED}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        TimeStampResponse response }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsRespGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                request}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ serialNumber}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getAndIncrement}\OperatorTok{(),} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Date}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{        log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Generated test timestamp — serial: \{\}, time: \{\}"}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                serialNumber}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Date}\OperatorTok{());}
        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{();}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Mocking OCSP with
WireMock}\label{_mocking_ocsp_with_wiremock}

For revocation checking tests, we use WireMock to simulate an OCSP
responder. This lets us return "good," "revoked," or "unknown" responses
without any real PKI:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Configure a WireMock OCSP responder stub}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Returns a pre}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{built OCSP response for any request}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{static} \DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{stubOcspResponder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{WireMockServer wireMock}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{        OCSPResp response}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

\NormalTok{    wireMock}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{stubFor}\OperatorTok{(}\FunctionTok{post}\OperatorTok{(}\FunctionTok{urlEqualTo}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"/ocsp"}\OperatorTok{))}
            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{withHeader}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Content{-}Type"}\OperatorTok{,}
                    \FunctionTok{equalTo}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"application/ocsp{-}request"}\OperatorTok{))}
            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{willReturn}\OperatorTok{(}\FunctionTok{aResponse}\OperatorTok{()}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{withStatus}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{200}\OperatorTok{)}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{withHeader}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Content{-}Type"}\OperatorTok{,}
                            \StringTok{"application/ocsp{-}response"}\OperatorTok{)}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{withBody}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{response}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{())));}
\OperatorTok{\}}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Build a }\CommentTok{"}\NormalTok{good}\CommentTok{"}\NormalTok{ OCSP response for testing}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{static}\NormalTok{ OCSPResp }\FunctionTok{buildGoodOcspResponse}\OperatorTok{(}
        \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ targetCert}\OperatorTok{,}
        \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ issuerCert}\OperatorTok{,}
        \BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ responderKey}\OperatorTok{,}
        \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ responderCert}\OperatorTok{)} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

\NormalTok{    BasicOCSPRespBuilder respBuilder }\OperatorTok{=}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaBasicOCSPRespBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    responderCert}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPublicKey}\OperatorTok{(),}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{()}
                            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CertificateID}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HASH\_SHA1}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{    CertificateID certId }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaCertificateID}\OperatorTok{(}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{()}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CertificateID}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{HASH\_SHA1}\OperatorTok{),}
            \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaX509CertificateHolder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{issuerCert}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{            targetCert}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSerialNumber}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{    respBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addResponse}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certId}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ CertificateStatus}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{GOOD}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{    ContentSigner signer }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA256withRSA"}\OperatorTok{)}
            \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{responderKey}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    BasicOCSPResp basicResp }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ respBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signer}\OperatorTok{,}
            \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ X509CertificateHolder}\OperatorTok{[]\{} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaX509CertificateHolder}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    responderCert}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\},}
            \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Date}\OperatorTok{());}

    \ControlFlowTok{return} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{OCSPRespBuilder}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            OCSPRespBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{SUCCESSFUL}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ basicResp}\OperatorTok{);}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Time Travel in Tests}\label{_time_travel_in_tests}

\subsection{The Clock Abstraction}\label{_the_clock_abstraction}

The most reliable way to handle time-dependent tests is to inject a
\texttt{Clock} into any component that checks certificate validity or
timestamp times:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Verification service that accepts an injectable Clock}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ for deterministic testing}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\AttributeTok{@Slf4j}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ VerificationService }\OperatorTok{\{}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final}\NormalTok{ Clock clock}\OperatorTok{;}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Production constructor }\CommentTok{—}\NormalTok{ uses system clock}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \FunctionTok{VerificationService}\OperatorTok{()} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{clock} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Clock}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{systemUTC}\OperatorTok{();}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Test constructor }\CommentTok{—}\NormalTok{ uses injected clock}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \FunctionTok{VerificationService}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{Clock clock}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \KeywordTok{this}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{clock} \OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ clock}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \KeywordTok{public}\NormalTok{ VerificationReport }\FunctionTok{verify}\OperatorTok{(}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ pdfBytes}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{            PDSignature signature}\OperatorTok{,}
            \BuiltInTok{Set}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{TrustAnchor}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ trustAnchors}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \CommentTok{// ... all validation uses this.clock instead of new Date()}
        \BuiltInTok{Date}\NormalTok{ validationTime }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{Date}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{from}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{clock}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{instant}\OperatorTok{());}
        \CommentTok{// ...}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Testing Expired
Certificates}\label{_testing_expired_certificates}

With the \texttt{Clock} abstraction, testing expired certificate
scenarios becomes straightforward:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\AttributeTok{@Test}
\DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{expiredCertificateWithoutTimestampShouldFail}\OperatorTok{()} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
    \CommentTok{// Generate a certificate valid for only 1 second}
    \BuiltInTok{KeyPair}\NormalTok{ keyPair }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{generateKeyPair}\OperatorTok{();}
    \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ shortLivedCert }\OperatorTok{=}
            \FunctionTok{generateCertWithValidity}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{keyPair}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{Duration}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofSeconds}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{));}

    \CommentTok{// Sign the PDF}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ pdf }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{generateTestPdf}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Short{-}lived cert test"}\OperatorTok{);}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signed }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{signPdfWith}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{pdf}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ keyPair}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPrivate}\OperatorTok{(),}
            \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{ shortLivedCert }\OperatorTok{\});}

    \CommentTok{// Travel forward in time — certificate is now expired}
\NormalTok{    Clock futureClock }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Clock}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fixed}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            Instant}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{now}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{plus}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{Duration}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofDays}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{)),}
\NormalTok{            ZoneOffset}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{UTC}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    VerificationService verifier }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{VerificationService}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{futureClock}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{    VerificationReport report }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ verifier}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{verify}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            signed}\OperatorTok{,} \FunctionTok{extractSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signed}\OperatorTok{),}\NormalTok{ trustAnchors}\OperatorTok{);}

    \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getHashResult}\OperatorTok{());}
    \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getCmsResult}\OperatorTok{());}
    \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{CHAIN\_INVALID}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{            report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getChainResult}\OperatorTok{());}
\OperatorTok{\}}

\AttributeTok{@Test}
\DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{expiredCertificateWithTimestampShouldPass}\OperatorTok{()} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
    \CommentTok{// Same setup, but this time we add a timestamp}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signed }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{signPdfWith}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{pdf}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ keyPair}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPrivate}\OperatorTok{(),}
            \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{ shortLivedCert }\OperatorTok{\},}
            \KeywordTok{true} \CommentTok{/* addTimestamp */}\OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// The timestamp proves the signature was created}
    \CommentTok{// before the cert expired}
\NormalTok{    Clock futureClock }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Clock}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{fixed}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            Instant}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{now}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{plus}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{Duration}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{ofDays}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{)),}
\NormalTok{            ZoneOffset}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{UTC}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    VerificationService verifier }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{VerificationService}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{futureClock}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{    VerificationReport report }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ verifier}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{verify}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{            signed}\OperatorTok{,} \FunctionTok{extractSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signed}\OperatorTok{),}\NormalTok{ trustAnchors}\OperatorTok{);}

    \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getChainResult}\OperatorTok{());}
    \FunctionTok{assertNotNull}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimestampTime}\OperatorTok{());}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Complete Signing-to-Verification Round-Trip
Test}\label{_complete_signing_to_verification_round_trip_test}

This is the most important test in the suite --- it exercises the entire
pipeline end-to-end:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\AttributeTok{@Test}
\DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{completeRoundTripSignAndVerify}\OperatorTok{()} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
    \CommentTok{// 1. Generate a test PDF}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ unsignedPdf }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{generateTestPdf}\OperatorTok{(}
            \StringTok{"Round{-}trip test — "} \OperatorTok{+}\NormalTok{ Instant}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{now}\OperatorTok{());}
\NormalTok{    log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Generated unsigned PDF: \{\} bytes"}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ unsignedPdf}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{length}\OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// 2. Sign with the test keystore (PAdES + timestamp)}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signedPdf }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{signPdf}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{unsignedPdf}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{,}
            \StringTok{"ETSI.CAdES.detached"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{    log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Generated signed PDF: \{\} bytes"}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ signedPdf}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{length}\OperatorTok{);}

    \CommentTok{// 3. Extract the signature}
    \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDDocument doc }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Loader}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{loadPDF}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedPdf}\OperatorTok{))} \OperatorTok{\{}
        \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ sigs }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignatureDictionaries}\OperatorTok{();}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ sigs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{size}\OperatorTok{(),} \StringTok{"Expected exactly one signature"}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        PDSignature sig }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ sigs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"ETSI.CAdES.detached"}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                sig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSubFilter}\OperatorTok{());}

        \CommentTok{// 4. Run the complete verification pipeline}
\NormalTok{        VerificationService verifier }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{VerificationService}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        VerificationReport report }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                verifier}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{verify}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedPdf}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ sig}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ trustAnchors}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 5. Assert every step passed}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getByteRangeResult}\OperatorTok{(),}
                \StringTok{"ByteRange check should pass"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getHashResult}\OperatorTok{(),}
                \StringTok{"Hash verification should pass"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getCmsResult}\OperatorTok{(),}
                \StringTok{"CMS verification should pass"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getChainResult}\OperatorTok{(),}
                \StringTok{"Certificate chain should validate"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTrustResult}\OperatorTok{(),}
                \StringTok{"Trust evaluation should pass"}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// 6. Verify timestamp is present and valid}
        \FunctionTok{assertNotNull}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimestampTime}\OperatorTok{(),}
                \StringTok{"Timestamp should be present"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{ValidationResult}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{OK}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimestampResult}\OperatorTok{(),}
                \StringTok{"Timestamp should be valid"}\OperatorTok{);}

        \FunctionTok{assertTrue}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{isValid}\OperatorTok{(),} \StringTok{"Signature should be valid"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertTrue}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{report}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{isTrusted}\OperatorTok{(),} \StringTok{"Signature should be trusted"}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Round{-}trip test PASSED — all steps verified"}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{PAdES Compliance Test}\label{_pades_compliance_test}

A PAdES-compliant signature must include specific signed attributes
beyond what plain CMS requires. We test for these explicitly:

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\AttributeTok{@Test}
\DataTypeTok{void} \FunctionTok{padesSignatureShouldHaveRequiredAttributes}\OperatorTok{()} \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ pdf }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{generateTestPdf}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"PAdES compliance test"}\OperatorTok{);}
    \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signed }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{signPdf}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{pdf}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{,} \StringTok{"ETSI.CAdES.detached"}\OperatorTok{);}

    \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDDocument doc }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Loader}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{loadPDF}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signed}\OperatorTok{))} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{        PDSignature sig }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignatureDictionaries}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        CMSSignedData cmsData }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{parseCmsSignedData}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signed}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ sig}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        SignerInformation signerInfo }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ cmsData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSigners}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{iterator}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{next}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        AttributeTable signedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                signerInfo}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignedAttributes}\OperatorTok{();}

        \CommentTok{// PAdES{-}B{-}B: Required signed attributes}
        \FunctionTok{assertNotNull}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSAttributes}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{contentType}\OperatorTok{),}
                \StringTok{"contentType attribute is required"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertNotNull}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSAttributes}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{messageDigest}\OperatorTok{),}
                \StringTok{"messageDigest attribute is required"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertNotNull}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signingCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{),}
                \StringTok{"ESS{-}signing{-}certificate{-}v2 is required for PAdES"}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// PAdES{-}B{-}B: signingTime SHOULD NOT be present}
        \CommentTok{// (PAdES relies on timestamps, not claimed signing time)}
        \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\NormalTok{ signingTime }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSAttributes}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{signingTime}\OperatorTok{);}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signingTime }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{warn}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"signingTime attribute is present — "} \OperatorTok{+}
                    \StringTok{"PAdES recommends omitting it in favor "} \OperatorTok{+}
                    \StringTok{"of a timestamp"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \CommentTok{// PAdES{-}B{-}T: Timestamp unsigned attribute}
\NormalTok{        AttributeTable unsignedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                signerInfo}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getUnsignedAttributes}\OperatorTok{();}
        \FunctionTok{assertNotNull}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{unsignedAttrs}\OperatorTok{,}
                \StringTok{"PAdES{-}B{-}T requires unsigned attributes"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \FunctionTok{assertNotNull}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                unsignedAttrs}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{get}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    PKCSObjectIdentifiers}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signatureTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{),}
                \StringTok{"PAdES{-}B{-}T requires a signature timestamp"}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Verify the digest algorithm is SHA{-}256 or stronger}
        \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ digestAlg }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signerInfo}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getDigestAlgOID}\OperatorTok{();}
        \FunctionTok{assertNotEquals}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"1.3.14.3.2.26"}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ digestAlg}\OperatorTok{,}
                \StringTok{"SHA{-}1 is not allowed for PAdES — "} \OperatorTok{+}
                \StringTok{"must use SHA{-}256 or stronger"}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"PAdES compliance test PASSED"}\OperatorTok{);}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Reference PDF Corpus: Naming
Convention}\label{_reference_pdf_corpus_naming_convention}

For reference PDFs that you ship with your test suite (for regression
testing or interoperability testing), use a consistent naming convention
that encodes the signature properties in the filename:

\begin{verbatim}
Naming pattern:
  <scenario>_<subfilter>_<timestamp>_<cert-type>_<extras>.pdf

Examples:
  basic_pkcs7-detached_no-ts_ca-signed_v1.pdf
  basic_cades-detached_rfc3161_ca-signed_v1.pdf
  pades-b-t_cades-detached_rfc3161_ca-signed_v1.pdf
  pades-b-lt_cades-detached_rfc3161_ca-signed_dss_v1.pdf
  selfsigned_pkcs7-detached_no-ts_self-signed_v1.pdf
  multi-sig_pkcs7-detached_no-ts_ca-signed_2sigs_v1.pdf
  tampered_pkcs7-detached_no-ts_ca-signed_modified_v1.pdf
  invisible_cades-detached_rfc3161_ca-signed_zero-widget_v1.pdf
\end{verbatim}

The \texttt{\_v1} suffix is a version number. When you regenerate
reference PDFs (because you changed the test keystore or signing code),
increment the version number. This ensures old and new reference files
can coexist temporarily during migration.

Store reference PDFs in \texttt{src/test/resources/reference-pdfs/} and
regenerate them with a dedicated test utility class. Never edit
reference PDFs by hand --- they should always be produced by code.
Commit the generated PDFs to your repository so tests can run without a
generation step, but include the generator so anyone can rebuild them.

\section{Key Takeaways}\label{_key_takeaways_17}

\begin{itemize}
\item
  PDF signature testing is hard because of three enemies: time, network,
  and state --- address all three explicitly
\item
  Generate test keystores programmatically with long validity periods
  (100 years) to avoid time-rot
\item
  Use an in-process TSA built from BouncyCastle instead of hitting real
  TSA servers
\item
  Mock OCSP responders with WireMock for deterministic revocation
  testing
\item
  Inject a \texttt{Clock} abstraction into verification services so you
  can freeze or advance time in tests
\item
  Build a test matrix that maps every scenario to expected per-step
  results
\item
  The round-trip test (generate PDF, sign, extract, verify) is the
  single most important test in the suite
\item
  Test PAdES compliance explicitly: check for
  \texttt{ESS-signing-certificate-v2}, proper SubFilter, and SHA-256+
\item
  Use a consistent naming convention for reference PDFs that encodes all
  signature properties in the filename
\item
  Generate reference PDFs from code, not by hand --- commit both the
  generator and the generated files
\end{itemize}

\section{Complete Code Listings}\label{_complete_code_listings}

This appendix collects the complete, compilable source code for the
major classes developed throughout Parts 5 and 6. Each listing is
self-contained --- you can copy it into your project, adjust the package
name, and compile. All code targets Java 21, Apache PDFBox 3.0.0, and
BouncyCastle 1.80.

\section{SigningService: Complete PDF Signing
Implementation}\label{_signingservice_complete_pdf_signing_implementation}

This is the full signing service from Chapters 29 and 30, consolidated
into a single class. It handles both \texttt{adbe.pkcs7.detached} and
\texttt{ETSI.CAdES.detached} signatures, with optional RFC 3161
timestamps.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{package}\ImportTok{ io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfalyzer}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{signing}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ByteArrayOutputStream}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{InputStream}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{OutputStream}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{HttpURLConnection}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{net}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{URL}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PrivateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cert}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ArrayList}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Calendar}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{util}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{List}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{lombok}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{RequiredArgsConstructor}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{lombok}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{extern}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{slf4j}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Slf4j}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Loader}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cos}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PDDocument}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{interactive}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{interactive}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignatureInterface}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1ObjectIdentifier}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ess}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{nist}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pkcs}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{SignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ContentSigner}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{DigestCalculatorProvider}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{operator}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{jcajce}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TSPAlgorithms}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampRequest}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampResponse}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{tsp}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{TimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{;}

\CommentTok{/**}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Complete PDF signing service}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Supports PKCS}\CommentTok{\#7}\NormalTok{ detached and PAdES CAdES}\CommentTok{{-}}\NormalTok{detached signatures}
 \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ with optional RFC }\CommentTok{3161}\NormalTok{ timestamps}\CommentTok{.}
 \CommentTok{*/}
\AttributeTok{@Slf4j}
\AttributeTok{@RequiredArgsConstructor}
\KeywordTok{public} \KeywordTok{class}\NormalTok{ SigningService }\OperatorTok{\{}

    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{PrivateKey}\NormalTok{ privateKey}\OperatorTok{;}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ certificateChain}\OperatorTok{;}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{final} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{;} \CommentTok{// null if no timestamp desired}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Sign a PDF document and return the signed bytes}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{pdfBytes}\CommentTok{    }\NormalTok{the unsigned PDF}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{subFilter}\CommentTok{   "}\NormalTok{adbe}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{pkcs7}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{detached}\CommentTok{"}\NormalTok{ or }\CommentTok{"}\NormalTok{ETSI}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{CAdES}\CommentTok{.}\NormalTok{detached}\CommentTok{"}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{name}\CommentTok{        }\NormalTok{signer name }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{optional}\CommentTok{)}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{reason}\CommentTok{      }\NormalTok{signing reason }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{optional}\CommentTok{)}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@param}\CommentTok{ }\AnnotationTok{location}\CommentTok{    }\NormalTok{signing location }\CommentTok{(}\NormalTok{optional}\CommentTok{)}
     \CommentTok{*} \AnnotationTok{@return}\NormalTok{ the signed PDF bytes}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{public} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{sign}\OperatorTok{(}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ pdfBytes}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ subFilter}\OperatorTok{,}
            \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ name}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ reason}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ location}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \ControlFlowTok{try} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDDocument doc }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ Loader}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{loadPDF}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{pdfBytes}\OperatorTok{))} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            PDSignature pdSig }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            pdSig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setFilter}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{FILTER\_ADOBE\_PPKLITE}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            pdSig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSubFilter}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{COSName}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getPDFName}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{subFilter}\OperatorTok{));}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{name }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)}\NormalTok{ pdSig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setName}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{name}\OperatorTok{);}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{reason }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)}\NormalTok{ pdSig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setReason}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{reason}\OperatorTok{);}
            \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{location }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)}\NormalTok{ pdSig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setLocation}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{location}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            pdSig}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSignDate}\OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{Calendar}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{            SignatureInterface sigInterface }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ content }\OperatorTok{{-}\textgreater{}} \OperatorTok{\{}
                \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ data }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{readAllBytes}\OperatorTok{();}
                \ControlFlowTok{return} \FunctionTok{buildCmsSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{data}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ subFilter}\OperatorTok{);}
            \OperatorTok{\};}

\NormalTok{            doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{pdSig}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ sigInterface}\OperatorTok{);}

            \BuiltInTok{ByteArrayOutputStream}\NormalTok{ result }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{ByteArrayOutputStream}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{            doc}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{saveIncremental}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{result}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{            log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"PDF signed successfully — \{\} bytes, SubFilter=\{\}"}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                    result}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{size}\OperatorTok{(),}\NormalTok{ subFilter}\OperatorTok{);}
            \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ result}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{toByteArray}\OperatorTok{();}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Build the CMS SignedData for the given content bytes}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{private} \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]} \FunctionTok{buildCmsSignature}\OperatorTok{(}\DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ content}\OperatorTok{,} \BuiltInTok{String}\NormalTok{ subFilter}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \CommentTok{// Digest the content}
        \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ digest }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ hash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ digest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{content}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Build the CMS generator}
\NormalTok{        CMSSignedDataGenerator gen }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSSignedDataGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        DigestCalculatorProvider dcProv }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaDigestCalculatorProviderBuilder}\OperatorTok{()}
                        \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        ContentSigner signer }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaContentSignerBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}
                \StringTok{"SHA256withRSA"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{setProvider}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"BC"}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{privateKey}\OperatorTok{);}

\NormalTok{        JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder signerBuilder }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaSignerInfoGeneratorBuilder}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{dcProv}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// For PAdES: add ESS{-}signing{-}certificate{-}v2}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"ETSI.CAdES.detached"}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{equals}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{subFilter}\OperatorTok{))} \OperatorTok{\{}
            \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ certHash }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{)}
                    \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certificateChain}\OperatorTok{[}\DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{].}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}
\NormalTok{            ESSCertIDv2 certId }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AlgorithmIdentifier}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                            NISTObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_sha256}\OperatorTok{),}
\NormalTok{                    certHash}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{            SigningCertificateV2 sigCertV2 }\OperatorTok{=}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{SigningCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{(}
                            \KeywordTok{new}\NormalTok{ ESSCertIDv2}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{ certId }\OperatorTok{\});}

            \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\NormalTok{ sigCertAttr }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                    PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signingCertificateV2}\OperatorTok{,}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{sigCertV2}\OperatorTok{));}

\NormalTok{            AttributeTable signedAttrs }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{ sigCertAttr }\OperatorTok{\});}
\NormalTok{            signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setSignedAttributeGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}
                    \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DefaultSignedAttributeTableGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedAttrs}\OperatorTok{));}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

\NormalTok{        gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addSignerInfoGenerator}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                signerBuilder}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{build}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signer}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ certificateChain}\OperatorTok{[}\DecValTok{0}\OperatorTok{]));}

        \CommentTok{// Add all certificates in the chain}
        \BuiltInTok{List}\OperatorTok{\textless{}}\BuiltInTok{Certificate}\OperatorTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ certList }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{ArrayList}\OperatorTok{\textless{}\textgreater{}();}
        \ControlFlowTok{for} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{X509Certificate}\NormalTok{ cert }\OperatorTok{:}\NormalTok{ certificateChain}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            certList}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{add}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{cert}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}
\NormalTok{        gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{addCertificates}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{JcaCertStore}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{certList}\OperatorTok{));}

        \CommentTok{// Generate the CMS SignedData}
\NormalTok{        CMSProcessableByteArray processable }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{CMSProcessableByteArray}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{content}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        CMSSignedData signedData }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ gen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{processable}\OperatorTok{,} \KeywordTok{false}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Add timestamp if TSA URL is configured}
        \ControlFlowTok{if} \OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{)} \OperatorTok{\{}
\NormalTok{            signedData }\OperatorTok{=} \FunctionTok{addTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signedData}\OperatorTok{);}
        \OperatorTok{\}}

        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ encoded }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"CMS signature built: \{\} bytes, timestamp=\{\}"}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                encoded}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{length}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ tsaUrl }\OperatorTok{!=} \KeywordTok{null}\OperatorTok{);}
        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ encoded}\OperatorTok{;}
    \OperatorTok{\}}

    \CommentTok{/**}
     \CommentTok{*}\NormalTok{ Request a timestamp from the TSA and add it as an unsigned attribute}\CommentTok{.}
     \CommentTok{*/}
    \KeywordTok{private}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData }\FunctionTok{addTimestamp}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{CMSSignedData signedData}\OperatorTok{)}
            \KeywordTok{throws} \BuiltInTok{Exception} \OperatorTok{\{}

        \CommentTok{// Hash the signature value}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ signatureBytes }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ signedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSignerInfos}\OperatorTok{()}
                \OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getSigners}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{iterator}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{next}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{getSignature}\OperatorTok{();}
        \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\NormalTok{ tsDigest }\OperatorTok{=} \BuiltInTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInstance}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"SHA{-}256"}\OperatorTok{);}
        \DataTypeTok{byte}\OperatorTok{[]}\NormalTok{ tsHash }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsDigest}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{digest}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{signatureBytes}\OperatorTok{);}

        \CommentTok{// Build and send the timestamp request}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequestGenerator reqGen }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampRequestGenerator}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setCertReq}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampRequest tsReq }\OperatorTok{=}
\NormalTok{                reqGen}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{generate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{TSPAlgorithms}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{SHA256}\OperatorTok{,}\NormalTok{ tsHash}\OperatorTok{);}

        \BuiltInTok{HttpURLConnection}\NormalTok{ conn }\OperatorTok{=} \OperatorTok{(}\BuiltInTok{HttpURLConnection}\OperatorTok{)}
                \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{URL}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsaUrl}\OperatorTok{).}\FunctionTok{openConnection}\OperatorTok{();}
\NormalTok{        conn}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setDoOutput}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{true}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        conn}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setRequestMethod}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"POST"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        conn}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{setRequestProperty}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Content{-}Type"}\OperatorTok{,}
                \StringTok{"application/timestamp{-}query"}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        conn}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getOutputStream}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{write}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsReq}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getEncoded}\OperatorTok{());}

\NormalTok{        TimeStampResponse tsResp }\OperatorTok{=}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{TimeStampResponse}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{conn}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getInputStream}\OperatorTok{());}
\NormalTok{        tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{validate}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsReq}\OperatorTok{);}
\NormalTok{        TimeStampToken tsToken }\OperatorTok{=}\NormalTok{ tsResp}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{();}

\NormalTok{        log}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{info}\OperatorTok{(}\StringTok{"Timestamp obtained — TSA time: \{\}"}\OperatorTok{,}
\NormalTok{                tsToken}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{getTimeStampInfo}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{getGenTime}\OperatorTok{());}

        \CommentTok{// Embed as unsigned attribute}
        \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\NormalTok{ tsAttr }\OperatorTok{=} \KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                PKCSObjectIdentifiers}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{id\_aa\_signatureTimeStampToken}\OperatorTok{,}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{DERSet}\OperatorTok{(}\NormalTok{tsToken}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{toCMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{().}\FunctionTok{toASN1Structure}\OperatorTok{()));}

        \ControlFlowTok{return}\NormalTok{ CMSSignedData}\OperatorTok{.}\FunctionTok{replaceUnsignedAttributes}\OperatorTok{(}
\NormalTok{                signedData}\OperatorTok{,}
                \KeywordTok{new} \FunctionTok{AttributeTable}\OperatorTok{(}\KeywordTok{new} \BuiltInTok{Attribute}\OperatorTok{[]\{}\NormalTok{ tsAttr }\OperatorTok{\}));}
    \OperatorTok{\}}
\OperatorTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

The full verification pipeline from Chapter 31, as a single compilable
class.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\KeywordTok{package}\ImportTok{ io}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfalyzer}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{verification}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{java}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{security}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{MessageDigest}\OperatorTok{;}

\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{lombok}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{extern}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{slf4j}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{Slf4j}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{apache}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdfbox}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{pdmodel}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{interactive}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{digitalsignature}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{PDSignature}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{ASN1OctetString}\OperatorTok{;}
\KeywordTok{import} \ImportTok{org}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{bouncycastle}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{asn1}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{cms}\OperatorTok{.}\ImportTok{CMSAttributes}\OperatorTok{;}
